items.notes: listDentalInvoices. EM-BIL-001: branchId REQUIRED (else 400) to prevent cross-branch enumeration. assertBranchAccess. Filters patientId/status; paginated; deterministic order. Read in withTenantTx.

items.title: List non-voided payments for an invoice
items.notes: listDentalPayments. Invoice by-PK fetch + branch authz on db; payment list read in withTenantTx. Paginated.

items.title: Get latest medical history review
items.notes: getMedicalHistoryReview.ts. P1-4. patientId query required (400). assertBranchAccess. Returns most recent review; 404 when patient never reviewed (client renders 'review never recorded — due now').

items.title: List amendments for visit
items.notes: listAmendments.ts. assertBranchAccess; paginated; data-access audit event.

items.title: List attachments for visit
items.notes: listAttachments.ts. assertBranchAccess; paginated; data-access audit event.

items.title: List consent forms for visit
items.notes: listConsentForms.ts. assertBranchAccess; paginated; data-access audit event.

items.title: List consent refusals for visit
items.notes: consent/listConsentRefusals.ts (root listConsentRefusals.ts is a re-export shim). Read-only; role gate includes hygienist + staff_full for read. Returns {data,pagination}.

items.title: List inventory adjustments for item
items.notes: listInventoryAdjustments.ts. Read role gate. 404 if item not in branch. G10 {data,pagination} envelope.

items.title: List inventory items for branch
items.notes: listInventoryItems.ts. Read role gate adds dentist_associate + hygienist. Verifies branch exists (404). G10 {data,pagination} envelope.

items.notes: listLabOrders.ts. assertBranchAccess; paginated; data-access audit event.

items.notes: listMedicalHistory.ts. patientId query required (400 if missing). assertBranchAccess via patient preferred branch. Paginated; data-access audit event.

items.title: List occlusion screenings for patient
items.notes: listOcclusionScreenings.ts. Read role gate adds staff_full + hygienist. G10 {data,pagination} envelope. 404 patient / 403 no branch.

items.title: List post-op templates for branch
items.notes: listPostopTemplates.ts. Read role gate adds staff_full + hygienist. ?category filter. Verifies branch exists (404). G10 {data,pagination} envelope.

items.title: List prescriptions for visit
items.notes: listPrescriptions.ts. Read-only; assertBranchAccess via parent visit. Paginated {data,pagination}; emits data-access audit event (clinical read).

items.title: Get one erasure request
items.notes: operationId getErasureRequest → getErasureRequestHandler. Read-only fetch by PK via ErasureRequestRepository.findOneById; NotFound if absent. Admin-only.

items.title: List erasure requests with filters
items.notes: operationId listErasureRequests → listErasureRequestsHandler. Read-only list filtered by status / subjectPersonId / tenantId. Returns the contract envelope `{ data: [] }` (ER-P2-1). Admin-only.

items.title: Get cached ceph analysis
items.notes: Validates analysisType against ANALYSIS_TYPES (unknown → 422). assertBranchAccess (non-member→404). Addon tier required. Audited PHI read.

items.title: Get ceph landmark detection job status
items.notes: Feature-flag gated (403 FEATURE_DISABLED), branch-role gated (non-member→404), addon tier (403). Synchronous detection model returns job synthesized from current landmarks.

items.title: Get ceph report snapshot (by version or latest)

userEntryPoint.control: Standalone print route (opened from imaging ceph; optional ?version=N)

items.notes: ?version=N selects a version, else latest. Read-only frozen snapshot; includes revisionOf/revisionReason lineage (G1-B). assertBranchAccess (non-member→404). Addon tier. Audited PHI read.

items.title: List ceph landmarks for an image
items.notes: assertBranchAccess; non-member → 404 (anti-enumeration). Addon tier required. Audited PHI read.

items.title: Get a ceph superimposition
items.notes: Authorizes via the TO report's branch (tenant isolation); non-member→404. Surfaces v1 honesty label.

items.title: List ceph superimpositions for a patient
items.notes: Per-row tenant isolation: filters to superimpositions whose TO report branch the user can access (no leak; inaccessible rows silently dropped).

items.title: Get CBCT viewer download link
items.notes: Returns presigned GET URL (15-min default expiry) for the study's volume image so the clinician opens it in an external DICOM viewer. Honesty guard: non-volume study → 422 NOT_A_VOLUME. Audited PHI read.

items.title: Get imaging study with images and tooth links
items.notes: Returns study + images with toothNumbers and viewerKind discriminator (volume vs flat). assertBranchAccess on study.branchId. Audited PHI read.

items.title: List findings for an image
items.notes: assertBranchAccess via study.branchId; non-member → 404. Audited PHI read.

items.title: List context links for an image
items.notes: assertBranchAccess via study.branchId.

items.title: List measurements/annotations for an image
items.notes: assertBranchAccess via study.branchId.

items.title: List patient images (imaging + legacy attachment union)
items.notes: Unions imaging_study_image rows (source='imaging') with legacy dental_attachment xray/photo/scan rows (source='legacy', via clinical-imaging.facade), sorted createdAt DESC. Requires ?branchId (400 if missing). Presigned download URLs per imaging object. G5 library filters (isDiagnostic/qualityStatus/tag/linkTargetId/linkType). Audited PHI read.

items.title: List legal holds with optional filters
items.notes: operationId listLegalHolds. Read-only. Filters by status (active|released), subjectPersonId, tenantId via LegalHoldRepository.findMany (buildWhereConditions). Read-only => be-unit only.

items.title: Get a branch by id
items.notes: assertBranchAccess: caller must hold active membership in the branch; missing branch → 404.

items.title: List branches for an organization
items.notes: EF-ORG-002: caller must be org owner or an active member of at least one branch in the org; otherwise 403. Returns {items, total}.

items.title: List branches the caller is an active member of
items.notes: Resolves user.id → active dental_membership → dental_branch. Empty membership → {items:[], total:0}. Drives branch-scoped login/selection.

items.title: Get branch settings
items.notes: assertBranchAccess. Returns {branchId, settings}. Settings JSONB carries feeSchedule, taxMode, vatRate, currency, defaultPaymentTermsDays, BIR fields, onlineBooking, reminderPolicy, billingReminderOffsetDays.

items.title: List branch consent-form templates
items.notes: FR8.4b. assertBranchAccess (any active member may view). Returns active templates only as a bare array (contract ApiOkResponse<DentalConsentTemplate[]>).

items.title: Owner dashboard summary (financials + lab orders)
items.notes: branchId query required (else ValidationError). N-ORG-01: dentist_owner only (returns practice-wide financials — outstanding balances/active payment plans), not any branch member. Inter-module reads via billing-dashboard.facade (FR0.7 active payment plans) + clinical-dashboard.facade (FR0.8 pending lab orders).

items.title: Read branch fee schedule (CDT catalog with effective prices)
items.notes: branchId query required (else ValidationError). assertBranchRole dentist_owner|dentist_associate. Joins active CDT catalog (owned by dental-visit via visit-org.facade) with per-branch overrides on branch.settings.feeSchedule; effective price via resolveFeeCents (override→catalog default→0). Currency from settings.currency (default PHP).

items.title: List branch members (flat paginated)
items.notes: branchId query required (else 400). assertBranchAccess. Pushdown status filter + LIMIT/OFFSET + count(*) for bounded reads (V-ORG-004). includeInactive query toggle. Strips pinHash/securityAnswerHash/securityQuestion. {data, pagination} shape.

items.title: List branch memberships (nested)
items.notes: G7-S1 assertBranchAccess (caller must be a member of this branch). G7-S2 strips credential fields. Active members only (includeInactive:false). {data, pagination}.

items.title: Get organization details
items.notes: EM-ORG-006: read gated to org owner OR an active member of any branch in the org; any other authenticated user → 403; missing org → 404.

items.title: Get caller org/branch/membership bootstrap context
items.notes: Resolves caller's org: owners via ownership (first active branch); non-owner staff via their first active membership → branch → org. Returns {org,branch,member} or all-null when no org. Used by FE to bootstrap localStorage post sign-in.

items.title: Get effective feature-permission grid
items.notes: P2-17. organizationId optional (resolves to caller-owned org). resolveOrgForCaller: owner OR active member of any branch may VIEW; else 403/404. Grid = catalog defaults overlaid with org override rows (role×feature cells with source default|override).

items.title: Get branch working hours
items.notes: Codegen re-export shim: tagged to dental-org but logic owned by dental-scheduling/workingHours. Validated WorkingHoursSchema accessor (V-ORG-003/BR-SCH-004); corrupt blob never reaches scheduling enforcement.

items.title: Detect duplicate patients
items.notes: P2-16: surface likely-duplicate groups (name+DOB+contact) per branch. assertBranchAccess on branchId. Detection half; merge itself deferred (BR-020 501).

items.title: Get case presentation aggregate + telemetry

userEntryPoint.control: CasePresentationPage (workspace child route) — Back to workspace btn

items.notes: P1-20: denormalized aggregate (phased money breakdown + alternates + annotated-image refs via case-presentation-imaging.facade + first name). Broad chairside read role-set. Records view telemetry (firstViewedAt once, lastViewedAt, draft/sent→viewed) — non-terminal.

items.title: Get claim readiness checklist
items.notes: CONF-DP-002: claim PHI → assertPatientBranchAccess. ready = hasCdtCode && hasIcd10 && active insurance profile && fee>0. Claim 404 if missing.

items.title: Get patient communication consent
items.notes: Reads persons.consent for the Person backing a patient (null if not found). Gates outbound reminders/recall: consumed by getPatientCommunicationConsent.ts, recallDispatch.ts, and reminderArmer.ts before dispatching SMS/email. Consent-before-communication invariant.

items.title: Get patient profile (aggregated)
items.notes: Profile with visitCount, lastVisit, outstanding balance (non-voided invoices), safetyFloor (allergy/med/condition counts), followUpNotes, consent, declared person subset. assertBranchAccess; branchless 403. Audited read patient.view.

items.title: Get household + members
items.notes: P1-27: household 404; assertBranchAccess. Members sorted guarantor-first.

items.title: Get a patient's household
items.notes: P1-27: patient 404 if missing; assertPatientBranchAccess. 204 if patient is in no household (absent optional sub-resource). Members guarantor-first.

items.title: Get patient safety floor
items.notes: FR2.15: aggregate active allergies/medications/conditions from medical history; hasAlerts iff allergies>0. assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.safety_floor.read (safety-critical PHI read).

items.title: Get itemized patient statement
items.notes: FR2.21: aggregate visits, invoices (+line items), payments. Money invariants: totalBilled/totalPaid sum non-voided invoices; outstanding = billed-paid. assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.statement.read (financial PHI).

items.title: Get treatment plan
items.notes: branchId query required but auth is against PATIENT's branch (V-VIS-011 cross-tenant PHI fix); aggregates diagnosed/planned/declined across visits; phase-order + priority + insertion sort; group by tooth; totalEstimateCents; current accepted version; cumulative completedToothNumbers (performed/verified across all visits).

items.title: Get treatment plan version snapshot
items.notes: branchId query required but auth against PATIENT's branch (V-VIS-011); version row must match patientId (cross-patient version access guard); returns immutable snapshot; 404 if not found for patient.

items.title: List case presentations
items.notes: P1-20: header list. Broad chairside read set (clinicians+coordinator+billing); schedule-only/read-only excluded; branchless 403.

items.title: List coverage authorizations
items.notes: assertPatientBranchAccess. Lists LOAs for the patient.

items.title: List dental alerts
items.notes: alt01: active + inactive alerts. assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.alerts.read.

items.title: List / search patients
items.notes: branchId REQUIRED (400 if absent) — strict per-branch scope, never org-wide (EM-PAT-004/EF-PAT-003). All dental roles may read (V-PAT-008). Filters q/needsFollowUp/status; pagination limit cap 200; batched visit stats.

items.title: List due recalls (front-desk recare worklist)
items.notes: P1-24: branch-scoped (not patient) recare list. assertBranchAccess on branchId. Non-terminal recalls (pending/sent) in [from,to] (defaults today..+30d in branch tz from getBranchReminderPolicy). from/to YYYY-MM-DD validated; pagination perPage cap 200; enriched with patient name.

items.title: List follow-up notes
items.notes: FR2.12: V-PAT-003 roles staff_full/associate/owner; branchless DENIES. Reads JSONB notes array.

items.title: List patient claims
items.notes: assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.claims.read.

items.title: List patient conditions/treatments aggregate
items.notes: Aggregates chart tooth entries (entryClassification→status) + treatment rows across the patient's visits. V-PAT-002: branch derived from patient record + assertPatientBranchAccess ALWAYS (branchId is filter only, never the auth boundary — closes omit-branchId cross-tenant bypass). Paginated.

items.title: List patient contacts
items.notes: AC-002/BR-003: returns active (non-soft-deleted) contacts. assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.contacts.read.

items.title: List patient insurance profiles
items.notes: assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.insurance_profiles.read.

items.title: List patient recalls
items.notes: assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.recalls.read.

items.title: List patient tasks
items.notes: assertPatientBranchAccess. EF-PAT-005 audit patient.tasks.read.

items.title: List patient treatment plans
items.notes: assertPatientBranchAccess (EF-PAT-004). EF-PAT-005 audit patient.treatment_plans.read.

items.title: List patient visits (with chart teeth)
items.notes: Returns visit records with chart teeth (entryClassification mapped). V-PAT-002 branch-from-patient + assertPatientBranchAccess always. Paginated (default 20).

items.title: List sync logs
items.notes: AC-002/LF-BR-003: G1 branchId REQUIRED (400) from raw query (TypeSpec drift) — never return every org's logs; assertBranchAccess. Audit patient.sync_logs.read.

items.title: List treatment option group
items.notes: P1-19: lists alternate-case options (recommended flagged). 404 if group empty. assertPatientBranchAccess.

items.title: List treatment plan status history
items.notes: P2-8: chronological status-transition timeline (who/when/from→to). assertPatientBranchAccess; plan 404 if missing. EF-PAT-005 audit read.

items.title: Get a perio chart by id (with readings + CAL)
items.notes: Read allows clinical roles + staff_full (staff_scheduling excluded). Reconciles chart lock against parent visit on read (lazy cascade). Coerces numeric summary columns to numbers; attaches read-only per-site CAL.

items.title: Get the perio chart for a visit (204 if none)
items.notes: Resolves visit via getVisitOrThrow; clinical roles + staff_full read. Returns 204 No Content when no chart exists for the visit. Lazy visit-lock cascade on read; numeric coercion + per-site CAL.

items.title: List a patient's finalized perio charts (multi-exam comparison)
items.notes: Returns finalized (completed/locked) charts only, most-recent-first, bounded to 12, each with readings + CAL. Empty patient => empty list with no auth target (no data leak). Branch auth derived from first chart's branch (clinical roles + staff_full).

items.title: Read the current PMD for a visit

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Portable medical document icon → PMDViewerSheet

items.notes: getPMDForVisit. Returns the single 'generated' (non-superseded) PMD for the visit, or 204 when the visit exists but has no PMD yet (matches getVisitPerioChart). Patient-self may read; otherwise branch membership required.

items.title: Read / parse an imported PMD
items.notes: getImportedPMD (FR12.2). Lightweight stub probe for patientId before loading sensitive content (auth-before-content). Parses content as JSON when possible else raw text (contentType json|text). Branch access via preferredBranchId; emits a data-access audit event via ctx.audit.

items.title: List a patient's generated PMDs
items.notes: listPMDs. Requires patientId query param (400 if missing); 404 if patient not found. Paginated (default limit 50). Patient-self may list their own; otherwise branch access via preferredBranchId. Route registered at /dental/visits/pmd.

items.title: List a patient's imported PMDs
items.notes: listImportedPMDs. Requires patientId query (400 if missing); 404 if patient not found. Paginated (default 50). Patient-self may list; otherwise branch access via preferredBranchId.

items.title: Derive caller's own patientId from session (resolveSelfPatientIdOrThrow)
items.notes: Shared IDOR-critical primitive (handlers/shared/assert-self-patient.ts). Resolves patients.person === user.id (invariant user.id===person.id). resolveSelfPatientId returns null when no linked patient; resolveSelfPatientIdOrThrow throws ForbiddenError NOT_A_SELF_PATIENT (opaque message, no topology leak) when none. Single entry point all 3 /me reads use; eliminates client-supplied patientId.

items.title: Get appointment by id
items.notes: getAppointment. getAppointmentWithPatientName facade. By-PK read, NOT wrapped in withTenantTx. assertBranchAccess on the appointment's branchId (403 non-member); 404 if absent.

items.title: Public booking lookup by confirmation code
items.notes: getOnlineBooking (P1-25). Public; the unguessable confirmationCode is the bearer (min length 6 → else 422). findByConfirmationCode; 404 unknown. Returns PII-minimal view (branch + provider name, time, status, confirmationState) — never the patient record. confirmationCode has a partial-unique index.

items.title: List branch queue board (active items)
items.notes: listQueueBoard. assertBranchAccess. Returns non-terminal queue items (findActiveByBranch) read through withTenantTx([branchId]).

items.title: List branch waitlist entries
items.notes: listWaitlist. assertBranchAccess. Defaults to active (fillable) entries; optional ?status= returns scheduled/cancelled history. Read through withTenantTx([branchId]).

items.title: Public bookable availability (compute-on-read)
items.notes: getPublicAvailability (P1-25). Public, rate-limited (availabilityLimiter by IP). computeAvailability = working hours grid MINUS existing appointments and active holds (no materialized slot rows — truthful by construction). PII-free (free windows only). visitType enum gate; 31-day range cap; date validation. 404 branch missing; 400 booking disabled / visit-type-not-bookable.

items.title: Public booking config + bookable providers
items.notes: getPublicBookingConfig (P1-25). Public, rate-limited. getBranchOnlineBookingContext facade (dental-org). 404 if branch missing/inactive; returns enabled:false (not 404) when booking simply off so the UI renders 'not available online'. PII-free policy + filtered bookable providers.

items.title: Export structured chart snapshot
items.notes: assertBranchAccess; portable clinical record (header/odontogram/legend/treatment summary); chart teeth from visit chart else carried baseline; treatments aggregated across ALL patient visits; branch+provider names via org facade.

items.title: Get visit dental chart (with baseline carry-over)
items.notes: assertBranchAccess; returns visit's own chart, else synthesizes chart from patient baseline (returning-patient living document); 404 only for brand-new patient with no baseline -> FE 'Initialize Dentition'.

items.title: Get dental visit by id
items.notes: By-PK read; 404 if missing; assertBranchAccess on the visit's branch; intentionally NOT withTenantTx-wrapped (pure by-PK GET).

items.title: Per-tooth history across patient visits
items.notes: toothNumber numeric validation; empty list (no auth assert) when patient has no visits; assertBranchAccess off first visit's branch; only completed/locked visits; joins non-dismissed tooth treatment (surfaces/status/price); reverse-chronological + pagination.

items.title: Get visit note version history
items.notes: Owner/associate role gate (read restricted to dentists); 404 if no note; returns ordered version snapshots (v1 sign, v2+ addenda).

items.title: Get visit SOAP notes (with history)
items.notes: assertBranchAccess; 404 if no notes row; returns notes plus version history.

items.title: List open chart sync conflicts for a patient
items.notes: Authorizes against patient's branch (assertPatientBranchAccess, V-VIS-011 pattern); surfaces persisted syncStatus='conflict' rows (reason + rejectedTeeth) so dropped offline edits are visible.

items.title: List findings for a visit
items.notes: assertBranchAccess; returns active + resolved (FE filters to active).

items.title: List treatments for a visit
items.notes: assertBranchAccess off visit branch; pagination (default limit 100).

items.title: List dental visits (by branch/patient/status)
items.notes: branchId query param required; assertBranchAccess; withTenantTx-scoped read (RLS second wall for EM-BIL-002 leak class); in-memory pagination.

items.title: List active treatment templates (branch)
items.notes: branchId query required; assertBranchAccess; returns only active branch-scoped templates.

items.title: Exit the comparison/superimposition view
items.notes: comparison-view.tsx onClose clears comparisonItems back to the list. Pure local state.

items.title: Export the composited ceph report as PNG

userEntryPoint.control: "PNG" button (shown after a report version is created)

items.notes: handleExportPng → composeCephCanvas(img, landmarks) + canvasToPngBlob → client download (ceph-report-{imageId}-v{n}.png). Requires CORS-clean image (crossOrigin anonymous). Pure client export; no endpoint.

items.title: Image blob cached for offline viewing (IndexedDB)
items.notes: use-offline-cache.ts getCachedBlob/setCachedBlob (dentalemon-imaging IDB). On first load fetches the presigned blob and caches it (crossOrigin anonymous so canvas stays untainted for loupe/PNG export). Comparison panes read getCachedBlob to render or degrade offline.

items.title: Select a landmark from the palette to place/nudge
items.notes: CephLandmarkPalette onSelect sets selectedCode (shared canvas/keyboard/loupe). Locked landmarks disabled; AI-suggested points show "AI · unconfirmed" + confidence + low-confidence flag. Selection only; commit happens on place/nudge.

items.title: Adjust superimposition opacity / onion-skin crossfade
items.notes: resolveBLayerOpacity(opacityPct,onionSkin,reducedMotion) sets the later-timepoint layer opacity; respects prefers-reduced-motion. Pure client display control. mm deltas gated on both timepoints calibrated (superimposition-uncalibrated note).

items.title: Switch reference norm population for ceph chips
items.notes: CephWorkspacePanel population state → CephMeasurementsPanel getNorm/classifyDeviation per population (client norms from @monobase/ceph-math). Affects deviation chips only; no endpoint. Also pinned into the report body when generated.

items.title: Toggle ceph overlay layers (landmarks / tracing / arcs)
items.notes: CephLayerPanel onChange → onLayerChange lifts state to imaging-workspace cephLayers, showing/hiding the SVG overlays. Pure client display.

items.title: Adjust viewer brightness / contrast
items.notes: CSS filter on the canvas container (0–200%). Pure client; no persistence.

items.title: Enter fullscreen for the viewer
items.notes: containerRef.requestFullscreen(). Pure browser API.

items.title: Pan / wheel-zoom the image
items.notes: imaging-workspace.tsx wheel zoom (clamp 0.1–10) + mouse pan (only when no tool active). Pure canvas transform.

items.title: Rotate / flip the image in the viewer

userEntryPoint.control: aria-label Rotate clockwise / counter-clockwise / Flip image

items.notes: imaging-workspace.tsx rotate()/flip() mutate refs + re-render canvas; cephTransform kept in sync so overlays don't drift. Pure canvas-state, no endpoint.

items.title: Initialize OneSignal SDK on app boot

userEntryPoint.route: app root (app.tsx useEffect, gated on runtimeConfig.onesignalAppId)

items.notes: initializeOneSignal() runs once when runtime config has onesignalAppId; sets isInitialized and optional app tag (VITE_ONESIGNAL_APP_TAG). All push functions are no-ops until this completes — drives whether the opt-in prompt and click routing are live. Pure client init, no backend endpoint.

items.title: Sync OneSignal external user id on login/logout

userEntryPoint.route: app root (useOneSignal in app.tsx, runs on session change)

items.notes: On session.user.id present -> setOneSignalUserId (OneSignal.login) so this user can be targeted; on logout -> clearOneSignalUserId (OneSignal.logout). No-op when OneSignal uninitialized. Targets via external_id per app-agnostic single ONESIGNAL_APP_ID pattern. No app backend endpoint.

items.title: Dismiss push opt-in nudge ('Not now')
items.notes: Sets per-device dismissed flag (localStorage) and hides prompt; does not request permission. Client-only, no backend endpoint.

items.title: Clinic wizard — navigate Back between steps
items.notes: handleBack moves to previous step and clears errors when stepIndex > 0. Pure client navigation; preserves entered state.

items.title: View clinic setup wizard (4-step stepper)

userEntryPoint.control: OnboardingWizard step indicator (Clinic Setup / Dentist Profile / Fee Schedule / First Patient)

items.notes: Route guarded by requireAuth ONLY (new owner has no PIN yet). Wizard hydrates from localStorage 'onboardingWizardState' (step + clinic/dentist/fees fields; NOT pin/patient). Render-only; mutations are separate items.

items.title: Person onboarding — go back to Personal Info from Address
items.notes: goBack decrements currentStep when > 1. Pure client navigation, no backend; preserves stashed form data.

items.title: View person onboarding — Step 1 Personal Information
items.notes: Route guarded by requireAuth + requireEmailVerified + requireNoPerson (requireNoPerson reads GET /persons/me). Step 1 prefills firstName/lastName from the Better-Auth user.name. Read/render only; submit is a separate item.

items.title: Navigate onboarding wizard steps and resume from saved localStorage state

userEntryPoint.control: Next / Back buttons; step indicator (Clinic Setup, Dentist Profile, Fee Schedule, First Patient)

items.notes: Pure client-side multi-step state machine: per-step validate() (clinic name/country, dentist name + 6-digit PIN regex, patient name/DOB), localStorage persistence (onboardingWizardState key) survives reload, restores step on mount. No backend call until finish.

items.title: Switch profile tabs (Overview / Payment History / Follow-up Log)
items.notes: Local tab state; each tab lazily mounts its own data surface (overview→visits/household/insurance, payment→billing/balance/credits, followup→notes). No endpoint for the switch itself.

items.title: Navigate back to step 1 from step 2
items.notes: goBack decrements currentStep (clamped at 1). Disabled while createPerson.isPending. Stashed personal/address state preserved across steps so fields repopulate via defaultValues + form.reset on remount.

items.title: Search and select country (combobox)
items.notes: Popover+Command searchable list of getNames() from country-list; onSelect stores the ISO 2-letter code (getCode), displays name (getName). Default code from detectCountry(). Pure client interaction, no endpoint; drives the address payload.

items.title: Remove existing avatar photo

userEntryPoint.control: PersonalInfoForm 'Remove avatar photo' button (X, destructive) — edit mode only

items.notes: handleRemoveAvatar clears selected file/preview, sets isAvatarRemoved, and form.setValue('avatar', undefined). On submit, isAvatarRemoved forces finalData.avatar=null so the persisted avatar is cleared. Only reachable when showAvatar (mode='edit'); not mounted by any current route.

items.title: Open Import External PMD form

userEntryPoint.control: PMDViewerSheet 'Import External PMD' button → onImportClick → setPmdImportOpen (300ms delayed to avoid overlapping animations)

items.notes: No backend call; opens the PMDImport bottom sheet (data-testid="pmd-import"). Pure UI navigation step. Only mounts when currentVisitId is set.

items.title: getPractitioner — privileged read of practitioner record
items.notes: Read-only. Admin|clinician|support|practitioner:owner-gated; returns FULL record verbatim (no redaction) — confidentiality depends on route role gate, not handler projection. 404 if not found. No public/patient read.

items.title: getPractitionerRole — read role assignment
items.notes: Read-only. Admin|clinician|support-gated. 404 if not found.

items.title: listPractitionerRoles — paginated role assignments
items.notes: Read-only. Admin|clinician|support-gated. Filters: practitioner (practitionerId), active, specialty. Pagination. Returns { data, pagination }.

items.title: listPractitioners — paginated practitioner directory
items.notes: Read-only. Admin|clinician|support-gated (no public/patient route). Filters: active, specialty. Pagination via parsePagination/buildPaginationMeta. Returns { data, pagination }.

items.title: Close invoice detail sheet
items.notes: onClose sets selectedInvoiceId=null, unmounting the sheet (open=false short-circuits render). Backdrop click also closes. Pure FE state.

items.title: Open Reports (RBAC route guard)
items.notes: Route mounts ReportsPage; beforeLoad: requireRole('reports') redirects unauthorized roles. canAccessReports(role) renders 'You do not have access to reports.' fallback for roles where reports=false (only dentist_owner/admin true per rbac.ts). Pure FE guard, no endpoint.

items.title: Switch report tabs (Revenue / Treatment / Patient)
items.notes: activeTab state drives which report renders. Tablist with aria-selected. No endpoint by itself; switching mounts the corresponding report which then fetches.

items.title: Settings access gate (RBAC route guard)
items.notes: routes/_dashboard/settings.tsx beforeLoad=requireRole('settings') redirects to /dashboard when role lacks access; SettingsPage also renders a 'You do not have access to settings' notice when !canAccess(role,'settings'). Pure client-side gate, no endpoint. Role read from org-context store (defaults to dentist_owner).

items.title: Switch settings panel via tab list

userEntryPoint.control: role=tablist buttons (Clinic / Working Hours / Fee Schedule / Payment Terms / Tax (VAT) / Reminder Cadence / Online Booking / Locale / Notifications / Consent Forms / Treatment Templates / Audit Log / Data Erasure)

items.notes: settings-page.tsx renders SETTINGS_PANELS (13 panels) as a tablist; clicking a tab sets activeKey and swaps the rendered panel Component. Client-only state, no endpoint.

items.title: Edit working hours per day (toggle open, set start/end)
items.notes: handleToggle flips open per day; handleTime sets start/end from 30-min TIME_OPTIONS; selects disabled when day closed. Local state only until save.

items.title: Role permission preview matrix
items.notes: Read-only derived view: rbac.canAccess(role, module) across 8 modules (dashboard/workspace/patients/calendar/billing/reports/staff/settings) -> Full Access / No Access. Pure client computation, no endpoint.

items.title: Generate presigned part-upload URL
items.notes: Returns a presigned URL for a specific 1-based partNumber. Requires the file to have an active multipartUploadId, a positive partNumber, owner match, and session. Route role user:owner. handlers/storage/generateMultipartPartUrl.ts.

items.title: Get file metadata + optional download URL
items.notes: Consolidated metadata + download endpoint. includeDownloadUrl query (default true): if file.status==='available' returns presigned GET URL (expiresAt=now+15min); storage error degrades gracefully to downloadError, not a 500; non-available files return statusMessage instead. Emits a HIPAA data-access audit event. Route roles admin or user:owner. handlers/storage/getFile.ts.

items.title: Get presigned download URL (strict)
items.notes: Strict download variant: requires file.status==='available' (else FILE_NOT_AVAILABLE BusinessLogicError) and returns { downloadUrl, expiresAt=now+15min, file }. Route roles admin or user:owner. handlers/storage/getFileDownload.ts.

items.title: List files (paginated, owner-scoped)
items.notes: Paginated listing (default limit 20) with status/owner filters. Non-admins are force-scoped to owner=user.id; admins see all (with audit). Emits HIPAA data-access audit event (resource='multiple'). handlers/storage/listFiles.ts.

items.title: Toggle workspace fullscreen (operatory display)

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Fullscreen / Exit fullscreen button

items.notes: FullscreenButton: requestFullscreen / exitFullscreen, syncs with fullscreenchange. Pure browser UI for chairside operatory display; no endpoint.

items.title: Explain why the selected tooth shows its odontogram layer/color
items.notes: P0-D: explainToothLayer derives the words from the SAME resolveToothLayer the chart renders with (deriveChartLayerSets over the treatment-plan aggregate) so the slideout text cannot disagree with the rendered color. Pure FE derivation; no endpoint.

items.title: Filter the treatment table to the selected tooth
items.notes: Selecting a tooth filters TreatmentTable rows; clear chip (tooth-filter-clear) restores all. View-completed toggle (view-completed-btn) shows/hides completed rows. Pure FE filtering; no endpoint.

items.title: Navigate from workspace to the patient profile
items.notes: PROF-04: Link to /patients/$patientId. Crossing into the _dashboard tree relies on the shared PIN session (CC-2). Pure navigation; no endpoint.

items.title: Filter timeline by year
items.notes: Client-side filter over already-loaded visits (yearFilter state). The 'open visit' / New-Visit gate is computed from the FULL list, never the filtered list, so an active visit hidden by the filter cannot falsely re-enable New Visit. Pure FE logic.

items.title: List audit logs (GET /audit/logs)
items.notes: operationId listAuditLogs. Compliance/HIPAA audit-trail viewer. Paginated (default limit 25, maxLimit 100) + filterable read over audit_log_entry. Touches PHI-adjacent compliance data => clinical/patient-safety class. Note: this is the platform-level audit module; the branch-scoped dental viewer (GET /dental/audit-events, WF-028) lives in the separate dental-audit module (out of scope here).

items.title: Capture authorized payment (provider decision)
items.notes: captureInvoicePayment.ts. Captures the held PaymentIntent via Stripe; sets paymentStatus='succeeded', status='paid', paidAt=now, records chargeId/transferId + providerDecision='capture'. Money + external → full layers.

items.title: Create invoice (draft)
items.notes: createInvoice.ts. Resolves merchant + customer persons via findBillingParty (person facade). Computes subtotal from line items (qty*unitPrice), tax=0 (ADR-011 tax out of scope v1), total=subtotal+tax. Persists via createWithLineItems transaction with status='draft'. Money/inter-module → full layers.

items.title: Create merchant account (Stripe Connect Express)

userEntryPoint.control: Set up payments / Create merchant account

items.notes: createMerchantAccount.ts. Creates a Stripe Connect Express account (businessType individual) and persists a merchant_account row with stripeAccountId, onboardingComplete=false. Pulls email/country from person contactInfo/primaryAddress (best-effort, collected during onboarding if absent). Money setup + external → full layers.

items.title: Delete invoice (draft only, hard delete)
items.notes: deleteInvoice.ts. Hard-deletes the row, returns 204. Money-adjacent write → full layers.

items.title: Finalize invoice (draft -> open/issued)
items.notes: finalizeInvoice.ts. draft -> 'open'. Fires best-effort billing notification to customer ('Invoice issued', AC-NOTIF-02). FSM transition + inter-module notifs → full layers. Conceptual sibling of dental-billing WF-052 [INFERRED] / BR-012 (draft->issued).

items.title: Get merchant Stripe Express dashboard link (5-min expiry)
items.notes: getMerchantDashboard.ts. Resolves 'me'; owner-only (person !== user.id → 403). Returns Stripe dashboard URL with expiresAt = now+5min. Guards: no stripeAccountId → 422 STRIPE_NOT_CONNECTED; !onboardingComplete → 422 ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE; no dashboardUrl → 422 DASHBOARD_UNAVAILABLE. Write (mints a link) but no money/PHI → standard write layers.

items.title: Mark invoice uncollectible (write-off)
items.notes: markInvoiceUncollectible.ts. open -> 'uncollectible'. Best-effort cancels any orphaned Stripe authorization (so no lingering card hold), writes a fail-closed audit row (action 'invoice.mark_uncollectible', failClosed:true — financial change must not commit without audit), then best-effort customer notification. Money + audit + inter-module → full layers. Conceptual sibling of dental-billing BR-047 (uncollectible terminal write-off, owner-only).

items.title: Onboard merchant account (Stripe onboarding link)
items.notes: onboardMerchantAccount.ts. Lazily creates a Stripe account if missing (createdLate flag), checks live account status, syncs status/onboardingComplete to metadata; returns dashboard URL if already complete else a fresh onboarding link. Money setup + external → full layers.

items.title: Switch billing top-level tab (Invoices / Collections / Insurance)
items.notes: Local useState tab switch in routes/_dashboard/billing.tsx; gates which surface renders. No network call itself. Insurance tab passes canWrite=canWriteBilling(role).

items.title: Pay invoice: create Stripe payment intent (hold-and-decide)
items.notes: payInvoice.ts. Creates Stripe PaymentIntent via connected account with platform fee = round(total*platformFeePct); stores stripePaymentIntentId in metadata, sets paymentStatus='pending'. Returns checkout/clientSecret. Money + external Stripe → full layers.

items.title: Refund captured invoice payment (partial/full)
items.notes: refundInvoicePayment.ts. Issues a Stripe refund against the charge; records stripeRefundId/refundAmount/refundStatus(full|partial) in metadata. Money + external → full layers. (Distinct from dental-billing BR-053 refund which is its own module.)

items.title: Stripe webhook handler (payment/charge/refund/account/transfer events)
items.notes: handleStripeWebhook.ts. Unauthenticated route (no authMiddleware); identity = verified Stripe signature. Dispatches payment_intent.succeeded->requires_capture, .failed->failed, .canceled->void, .requires_action->processing, charge.succeeded->paid, charge.failed->failed, charge.refunded->metadata, account.updated/deauthorized->merchant status, transfer.created/failed->log. Drives invoice money state from Stripe → full layers. Covered by handleStripeWebhook.test.ts.

items.title: Update invoice (draft only)
items.notes: updateInvoice.ts. Mutates paymentDueAt/paymentCaptureMethod/voidThresholdMinutes/metadata/lineItems. Recomputes subtotal/tax/total from line items using config.billing.taxRatePct when lineItems provided. Money write → full layers.

items.title: Void invoice (cancel authorized payment intent)
items.notes: voidInvoice.ts. Cancels the held PaymentIntent via Stripe; sets paymentStatus='canceled', status='void', voidedAt=now, providerDecision='void'. Money + external → full layers. Conceptual sibling of dental-billing WF-041 invoice void.

items.title: Reset the wizard to book another appointment

userEntryPoint.control: button 'Book another' on the confirmation screen

items.notes: wiz.reset() clears step/visitType/providerId/selectedSlot/sessionToken/confirmation back to the service step. Client-side only.

items.title: Cancel a booking (client or host)
items.notes: Mutual cancellation: either client or host may cancel (getBookingUserType decides marker, null => 403). Reason required and <=500 chars (ValidationError). Sets status=cancelled, cancelledBy, cancellationReason, cancelledAt; releases the slot back to available (booking=null). Sends in-app + WebSocket booking.cancelled to both parties. Inter-module (notifs) => all four layers.

items.title: Host confirms a pending booking
items.notes: Host-only state transition pending -> confirmed. Sets confirmationTimestamp=now. Requires host ownership (checkBookingHostOwnership) else 403; 404 if booking missing. Emits in-app notifications + WebSocket booking.confirmed to both client and host (non-blocking on failure). Inter-module (notifs) => all four layers.

items.title: Create booking (client books a slot)
items.notes: Client books a time slot. Slot must exist and be 'available' (else ConflictError). Computes durationMinutes from slot start/end. If slot- or event-level billingConfig present, creates a billing invoice FIRST (createInvoiceForBooking facade) and aborts booking if invoice creation fails; invoiceId is linked on the booking. Booking inserted as status='pending'; slot atomically flipped to 'booked' with booking ref. locationType defaults to slot.locationTypes[0]. Inter-module money flow (billing facade) => all four layers.

items.title: Create booking event (availability config)
items.notes: Owner creates an availability event. validateEventConfig must pass (ValidationError otherwise). dailyConfigs required. Smart defaults applied (timezone America/New_York, locationTypes video/phone/in-person, maxBookingDays 30, minBookingMinutes 1440, status active, effectiveFrom now). After insert, immediately calls regenerateEventSlots to generate initial slots.

items.title: Create schedule exception (block time)
items.notes: Owner-only (event.owner === user.id else 403; 404 if event missing). Blocks a datetime range for the event; inherits context/timezone from the event. Supports recurring with recurrencePattern. Slots overlapping the exception are filtered out during slot (re)generation.

items.title: Delete booking event (cascade slots/exceptions)
items.notes: Owner-only hard delete (event.owner === user.id else 403; 404 if missing). FK cascade removes associated slots and schedule exceptions. Returns 204.

items.title: Delete schedule exception
items.notes: Owner-only (exception.owner === user.id else 403; 404 if missing). Removes the block; future slot regeneration no longer filters that window. Returns 204.

items.title: Enter contact details on the details step
items.notes: Client-side form validation: firstName is required (submit no-ops without it); lastName/email/phone optional and trimmed-or-undefined. Creates PII captured into the booking commit.

items.title: Mark booking no-show (client or host)
items.notes: Either party may mark the other as no-show (getBookingUserType, null => 403). Booking must be confirmed (INVALID_STATUS_FOR_NO_SHOW). Exclusivity: cannot re-mark if already no_show_client/no_show_host (NO_SHOW_ALREADY_MARKED). Timing guard: client must wait 5 min, host 10 min past scheduledAt (NO_SHOW_TOO_EARLY). Sets status no_show_host (client marker) / no_show_client (host marker), noShowMarkedBy, noShowMarkedAt. Patient-safety-adjacent attendance tracking.

items.title: Regenerate slots for one event (on create/update)
items.notes: regenerateEventSlots (slotGenerator) runs synchronously on event create and on major-field update. Skips non-active events. Deletes existing FUTURE available slots for THAT event only (preserves booked slots), then regenerates from dailyConfigs minus exceptions for 30 days. Errors propagate to the HTTP caller on update.

items.title: Host rejects a pending booking
items.notes: Host-only. Only pending bookings may be rejected (BusinessLogicError INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION otherwise). Optional reason <=500 chars. Sets status=rejected, cancelledBy=host, cancelledAt; releases slot to available. Notifies client (+host ack) in-app + WebSocket booking.rejected. Inter-module (notifs) => all four layers.

items.title: Navigate back between wizard steps

userEntryPoint.control: Back button (data-testid=back) on slot and details steps

items.notes: Client-side only: details->slot and slot->service. No endpoint. Read/UI-only navigation but a write-flow step so fe-unit retained.

items.title: Update booking event with change detection
items.notes: Owner-only (event.owner === user.id else 403; 404 if missing). validateEventConfig must pass (400 with details otherwise). updateWithChangeDetection diffs major fields (timezone, locationTypes, effectiveFrom/To, dailyConfigs, status); when a major change is detected, regenerates slots immediately and lets errors propagate (500 on failure).

items.title: Create chat room (upsert)
items.notes: createChatRoom: creates a flexible multi-participant room with upsert semantics. Defaults admins to all participants. On existing room: upsert=false -> 409 ConflictError; upsert=true -> reconciles admins, links context, reactivates archived rooms, then 200. New room -> 201 with created:true. Returns created flag in response.

items.title: Send text message
items.notes: sendChatMessage (messageType=video_call branch): creates a video_call message (status 'starting'), sets room.activeVideoCallMessage, fans out comms.video-call-started in-app notifications to every other participant (notifs facade, best-effort: per-recipient failure logged not fatal). Guards: room exists (404), caller is participant (403), no existing active call (409 ConflictError), caller is room admin (403), videoCallData.participants required (ValidationError). Initiator auto-added to participants. consentValidated=true (room participation implies consent). Returns 201.

items.title: Update participant A/V status
items.notes: updateVideoCallParticipant: caller updates their own audioEnabled/videoEnabled in the active call; emits a mute/unmute/video system message on change. Guards: at least one of audioEnabled/videoEnabled provided (ValidationError), room exists (404), caller is participant (403), active call exists (404), caller is in call (404), caller has not left (404), caller has joined (ValidationError 'not joined yet'). Self-service only (operates on user.id). Returns 200 updated CallParticipant.

items.title: Chat room WebSocket (real-time chat + WebRTC signaling)
items.notes: ws.chat-room: authenticated room-scoped socket. onConnect validates room exists + caller is participant (else ws.close 1008), tracks channel chat-rooms/{room}, broadcasts user.joined. onMessage handles ping->pong; chat.message -> persists via createTextMessage + updateLastMessage + broadcasts savedMessage; chat.typing -> relays presence; video.offer/answer/ice-candidate -> opaquely relays WebRTC SDP/ICE to channel (excludes sender, server never inspects payload). onClose untracks + broadcasts user.left. Unknown types logged + ignored.

items.title: Card action: financial cards → billing (Details / View all / Manage)

userEntryPoint.control: Daily Collections 'Details' / Overdue 'View all' / Payment Plans 'Manage' buttons

items.notes: Navigation-only: navigate({to:'/billing'}). Only rendered for financial roles.

items.title: Card action: Today's Schedule → View all (calendar)
items.notes: Navigation-only: navigate({to:'/calendar'}). Also reached via Tomorrow Preview 'Open Calendar' link.

items.title: Card action: Pending Treatments → View all (patients)
items.notes: Navigation-only: navigate({to:'/patients'}).

items.title: Quick action: New Appointment
items.notes: Navigation-only: navigate({to:'/calendar'}). No mutation on dashboard.

items.title: Quick action: New Patient
items.notes: Navigation-only: navigate({to:'/patients'}). No mutation on dashboard; the actual create happens in the patients module.

items.title: Quick action: Open Workspace
items.notes: Navigation-only: navigate({to:'/patients'}). No mutation.

items.title: Audit event mutation rejected (append-only HTTP guard)
items.notes: Hand-mounted method-shadow guards in app.ts return 405 AUDIT_EVENT_IMMUTABLE for DELETE/PUT/PATCH on individual audit records regardless of auth state and route param. No update/delete handler exists. Compliance/clinical-adjacent so full layers required.

items.title: View audit log (getAuditEvents)
items.notes: Read-time union (#18 / decision-log Q2): base-module data-access PHI reads from audit_log_entry (sink #3) surface in the owner's dental audit viewer alongside dental_audit_log events. audit_log_entry has no branch/tenant column → scoped by ACTOR (active dental_membership of the viewed branch). Included only when eventType filter is unset or 'data-access'. Base details JSONB dropped (latent PHI) and replaced with {source:'base'} provenance. PHI-adjacent cross-module read → full layers.

items.title: Add line to a draft/ready claim
items.notes: addInsuranceClaimLine. Only draft|ready claims mutable (else CLAIM_IMMUTABLE). lockClaim FOR UPDATE re-asserts mutability vs concurrent status transition; line insert + recalculateBilled atomic in withTenantTx. Cross-tenant → 404. Tests: insuranceClaimLine.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Add credit to patient ledger
items.notes: addPatientCredit (Phase 4.1). Positive credit (goodwill/overpayment/refund). amount > 0 else ValidationError. Branch = explicit (assertBranchAccess) or patient preferredBranch. Audited fail-closed (patient_credit.added). Facades: getPatientBranchForBilling (patient), getActiveMembershipId/getBranchOrgId (dental-org).

items.title: Apply patient credit against invoice (atomic draw-down)
items.notes: applyCreditToInvoice (Phase 4.1). Atomic in withTenantTx: per-patient pg_advisory_xact_lock (classid 1001) → re-read invoice balance + ledger balance → addPayment + consuming negative ledger row. Audited fail-closed (invoice.credit_applied).

items.title: Apply percentage discount to invoice
items.notes: applyDentalDiscount. Owner-only. Reason required (DISCOUNT_REASON_REQUIRED). Rejects voided (VOIDED_INVOICE) / paid (ALREADY_PAID). Recomputes totals via applyDiscountRate. Audited fail-closed before/after. Tests: applyDentalDiscount.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Log collections outreach attempt (append-only)

userEntryPoint.control: Collections > Worklist -> data-testid=log-note-{patientId} -> data-testid=log-form-{patientId} (log-channel / log-text) -> data-testid=log-save-{patientId}

items.notes: createCollectionNote (Phase 2.4). APPEND-ONLY (no update/delete), AUDITED fail-closed (collection_note.created). Branch = explicit (membership asserted) or patient preferredBranch; logging staff active membership stamped createdByMemberId; contactedAt defaults to now.

items.title: Create invoice-anchored HMO insurance claim

userEntryPoint.control: Insurance > data-testid=new-claim-btn -> data-testid=claim-create (claim-patient-search / claim-profile-opt-{id} / claim-invoice-opt-{id}) -> data-testid=file-claim-btn

items.notes: createInsuranceClaim (P1-26). Multi-line, lines inline or derived from invoice line items (>=1 line else NO_CLAIM_LINES). Profile must belong to patient; invoice patient match (INVOICE_PATIENT_MISMATCH). Archived patient blocked (PATIENT_ARCHIVED). Claim + lines created atomically in withTenantTx, status draft. Facades: getPatientForDentalPatient (patient), getInsuranceProfileForBilling/getCoverageAuthorizationForBilling (dental-patient).

items.title: Create dental invoice from visit
items.notes: createDentalInvoice. Money + inter-module. Builds line items from performed/verified treatments; whole flow atomic in withTenantTx([branchId]). Emits DE-020 InvoiceCreated (best-effort). Facade calls: getTreatmentsForInvoiceLocked/markTreatmentsAsBilled (dental-visit), hasSignedConsentForVisit (dental-clinical), getBranchTaxConfig/getBranchOrgId (dental-org).

items.title: Create payment plan with auto-generated installments

userEntryPoint.control: footer 'Create Payment Plan' -> data-testid=payment-plan-create (plan-installments / frequency group / plan-start-date) -> 'Create Plan'

items.notes: createDentalPaymentPlan. owner/associate only. Rejects voided invoice (VOIDED_INVOICE) and zero balance (NO_BALANCE). One plan per invoice (PLAN_EXISTS via unique index); idempotent same-shape re-create → 200 replay, recovers from 23505 race on db. amountPerInstallment = floor(balance/n). Tests: createDentalPaymentPlan.concurrency/idempotency.test.ts.

items.title: Generate batch patient statements (read-side aggregation)
items.notes: generateStatementBatch (P2-14). For each patient with outstanding balance (or explicit patientIds, optional includeZeroBalance) compute total charges/payments/discounts/balance as of asOf. No rows persisted; returns batchId + statements. Stable ordering by name then id → deterministic statement numbers. EM-BIL-002 branch scoping. computePatientStatement (utils/aging).

items.title: Issue invoice (draft → issued) with due-date derivation
items.notes: issueDentalInvoice. Only draft → issued (else INVALID_STATUS). dueDate derived at issue (BR-048) unless explicit create-time dueDate set. owner/associate only. Write in withTenantTx([branchId]).

items.title: Mark invoice uncollectible (write-off)
items.notes: markUncollectible. Owner-only. Only issued/partial/overdue → terminal uncollectible (WRITE_OFF_FROM set); rejects paid/voided/draft (INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION) and repeat (ALREADY_UNCOLLECTIBLE). Lost-race re-check inside tx. Audited. Tests: markUncollectible.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Record patient payment against invoice

userEntryPoint.control: footer 'Record Payment' -> inline form (pay-amount / method group / pay-receipt) -> 'Record'

items.notes: recordDentalPayment. owner/associate/staff_full. Inserts dental_payment + invoice balance update atomically in withTenantTx. Audited fail-closed (payment.record); fires invoice.paid audit (DE-008/V-BIL-011) only on transition to fully paid. Tests: recordDentalPayment.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Post HMO remittance (EOB) against a claim
items.notes: recordClaimRemittance (P1-26). owner/associate/staff_full. Records dental_payer_payment, applies paid to anchored invoice via addPayment, writes off disallowed delta as invoice discount (hmo_disallowance), updates payer totals + advances claim FSM (→ partially_paid/paid). All in ONE withTenantTx. Reconciliation invariant: payer paid + patient payments + write-off close the invoice balance. Tests: recordClaimRemittance.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Refund a recorded payment (cash or to-credit)
items.notes: refundDentalPayment (Phase 4.2). Owner-only, reason-required. Atomic in withTenantTx: per-payment pg_advisory_xact_lock (classid 1002) → re-read payment+invoice → removePayment + dental_payment_refund record + optional positive credit row (bookAsCredit, source 'refund'). Synchronous payment.refunded audit IS the event (ADR-006). Tests: refundDentalPayment.concurrency.test.ts, dental-billing.refunds.test.ts.

items.title: Send patient statement (manual dunning nudge)
items.notes: sendPatientStatement. Enqueues outstanding-balance statement as billing notification on email+push. Branch-scoped (EM-BIL-002): explicit branchId asserts membership else patient preferredBranch; balance scoped to caller active branches via withTenantTx. Zero balance / no person → sent:false (not an error). Inter-module notifs createNotificationForModule. Tests: sendPatientStatement.test.ts.

items.title: Update claim line after payer decision
items.notes: updateInsuranceClaimLine. Sets approved/paid amount/status/description/billed. lockClaim serializes concurrent line edits (recalculateBilled is read-modify-write of the aggregate); line-not-found → 404. Atomic in withTenantTx. Line status enum: pending/covered/partial/disallowed.

items.title: Transition insurance claim status (FSM-validated)
items.notes: updateInsuranceClaimStatus. FSM-validated; stamps submittedAt/decisionAt/paidAt + payerReference/submissionChannel/denialReason per target. Submitting WITHOUT approved LOA warns (NO_APPROVED_LOA) but does NOT block. Cross-tenant → 404. Write in withTenantTx.

items.title: Update payment plan status (FSM-validated)
items.notes: updateDentalPaymentPlan. owner/staff_full. setStatus enforces FSM; terminal (completed/defaulted) reject all → 422 INVALID_TRANSITION. A terminal transition recomputes patient hasActivePaymentPlan archive flag (FIX-006). Authz resolved via the plan's invoice branch.

items.title: Void invoice (admin correction)
items.notes: voidDentalInvoice. Owner-only. Reason required (min 5/max 500, validator). Voidable from any non-voided status incl paid. Audited fail-closed with before/after+reason. Write in withTenantTx with lost-void-race guard (status<>'voided' predicate → ALREADY_VOIDED). Tests: voidDentalInvoice.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Void payment and reverse invoice balance
items.notes: voidDentalPayment. Owner-only. Guards: payment belongs to invoice (PAYMENT_MISMATCH), not already void (ALREADY_VOIDED), active membership required (NO_ACTIVE_MEMBERSHIP, getActiveMembershipId). Void + removePayment reversal atomic in withTenantTx; lost-void-race aborts before removePayment so reversal applies once. V-BIL-013 audited fail-closed. Tests: voidDentalPayment.concurrency.test.ts.

items.title: Approve amendment (supervisor approval — deferred 501)
items.notes: approveAmendment.ts. BR-019/TR-P1-05: supervisor approval intentionally DEFERRED behind feature flag dental_clinical_amendment_approval (default off, MODULE_SPEC §18). Endpoint exists for contract honesty but always returns 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED. Auth (session) required. Do not implement approval logic without lifting the flag.

items.title: Create clinical amendment
items.notes: createAmendment.ts. EM-CLI-011: dentist role gate via assertBranchRole (not bare membership). authorMemberId resolved from caller's active membership. V-CLN-011: originalRecordId must resolve for in-module record types (prescription/consent/labOrder/medicalHistory) -> 404 if dangling; cross-module/free-form types pass unchecked. Additive correction path (original stays immutable). Writes clinical.amendment.created audit row. 201.

items.title: Upload clinical attachment to visit
items.notes: createAttachment.ts. E2: role gate includes dental_assistant (upload under supervision) + dentist roles + staff_full. BR-003 block on locked/completed visit -> 422 VISIT_LOCKED. Stores imageType, toothNumbers, fileName, filePath (S3 key), fileSizeBytes, mimeType, note. Backing object lives in storage/S3-MinIO (WF-098). 201.

items.title: Create consent form

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Consent icon → ConsentSheet consent tab (signature canvas)

items.notes: createConsentForm.ts. V-CLN-006: dentist roles only (hygienist NOT permitted). BR-003 block on locked/completed visit (422 VISIT_IMMUTABLE). Persists ADA-required structured content (procedureNature/benefits/risks/alternatives/risksOfNonTreatment). Created unsigned. 201.

items.title: Create inventory stock adjustment (atomic ledger + running total)
items.notes: createInventoryAdjustment.ts + InventoryRepository.createAdjustment. Role gate dentist_owner/staff_full. 404 if item not in branch. Quantity invariant: inserts adjustment ledger row AND increments item.quantityOnHand (sql += quantity) in the SAME DB transaction so ledger and running total never disagree. CreateAdjustmentBody rejects quantity===0. adjustmentType enum (restock/usage/disposal/correction). 201.

items.title: Create inventory item
items.notes: createInventoryItem.ts. P2-004. Branch-scoped. Role gate dentist_owner/staff_full (NOT associate). Verifies branch exists (404). category enum (consumable/instrument/medication/equipment/other). quantityOnHand defaults 0, reorderLevel defaults 10. 201.

items.title: Create lab order

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Lab orders icon → LabOrdersSheet create

items.notes: createLabOrder.ts. Dentist role gate. BR-003 block on completed/locked visit -> 422 VISIT_IMMUTABLE. P2-12 restoration detail (shade/material/dueDate/expectedDeliveryDate). Created in 'ordered' status. ADR-006/DE-014 LabOrderCreated: synchronous lab_order.created audit row. 201.

items.title: Create medical history entry
items.notes: createMedicalHistoryEntry.ts. Branch resolved via patient.preferredBranchId (404 patient / 403 no branch). MODULE_SPEC §6 role gate: dentist_owner/associate/staff_full (hygienist NOT permitted). AC-MED-02/V-CLN-009: entries immutable; an entry with resolvedDate is created with active=false (won't surface as safety-floor alert). entryType drives allergy/medication/condition safety-floor. 201.

items.title: Create occlusion screening
items.notes: createOcclusionScreening.ts. Clinical write. Branch via patient.preferredBranchId (404 patient / 403 no branch). Dentist role gate (dentist_owner/associate). Captures Angle class, overbite/overjet mm, crossbite/crowding/spacing, midline deviation. Stamps createdBy/updatedBy. 201.

items.title: Create post-op instruction template
items.notes: createPostopTemplate.ts. Branch-scoped. Dentist role gate (dentist_owner/associate). Verifies branch exists (404). category enum (extraction/implant/root_canal/...). Created active=true. Stamps createdBy/updatedBy. 201.

items.title: Create prescription

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Write prescription icon → RxSheet (new) submit

items.notes: createPrescription.ts. Auth required; branch role gate (dentist_owner/associate via parent visit). Enforces BR-003 (no writes to locked/completed visit -> 422 VISIT_IMMUTABLE), EM-CLI-005 (prescriberMemberId must be an active membership in this branch -> 403), FR1.12 allergy cross-check (non-blocking warning) and P1-2 drug-interaction check (non-blocking warning). Writes prescription.created audit row. Returns 201 with optional warnings envelope. controlledSubstanceSchedule defaults to 'none'.

items.title: Delete (soft) clinical attachment
items.notes: deleteAttachment.ts. Dentist role gate (dentist_owner/associate). Soft delete (deletedAt). 404 if not found. Writes data-modification audit event (clinical delete). 204.

items.title: Record informed consent refusal
items.notes: consent/recordConsentRefusal.ts (root recordConsentRefusal.ts is a re-export shim). P1-3 informed-refusal (ADA), distinct from consent grant. Dentist role gate (V-CLN-006). BR-003 block on locked/completed visit -> 422 VISIT_IMMUTABLE. Immutable once created (refusedAt=now). Writes consent.refused audit row. 201.

items.title: Record medical history review (ASA classification)
items.notes: recordMedicalHistoryReview.ts. P1-4. Branch via patient.preferredBranchId; role gate dentist_owner/associate/staff_full. Append-only: each call inserts a new review row (reviewedAt=now) capturing ASA Physical Status classification + asaEmergency flag. The 'due for review' prompt derives from the latest reviewedAt. 201.

items.title: Revoke consent form
items.notes: revokeConsentForm.ts (EM-CLI-001 implements the missing WF-035 endpoint). Dentist role gate. Signed form cannot be revoked -> 422 CONSENT_ALREADY_SIGNED. Already-revoked -> 409 (also covers the read-then-update race). ADR-006/DE-013: revocation recorded synchronously via consent.revoked audit row (no event bus). Sets revoked/revokedAt/revokedBy.

items.title: Sign consent form (obtain consent signature)
items.notes: signConsentForm.ts. Dentist role gate. V-CLN-005/BR-014: already-signed form is immutable -> 422 CONSENT_FORM_SIGNED. V-CLN-010: a revoked consent cannot be signed -> 422 CONSENT_FORM_REVOKED. Captures signatureData + signedAt. Writes consent.signed audit row. 404 if not found.

items.title: Update inventory item
items.notes: updateInventoryItem.ts. Role gate dentist_owner/staff_full. Partial whitelisted update (name/category/unit/status/quantityOnHand/reorderLevel/notes). Branch-scoped read-then-write (404 if item not in branch). UpdateInventoryItemBody requires >=1 field.

items.title: Update lab order / status progression (FSM)
items.notes: updateLabOrder.ts. Dentist role gate. When body.status present, routes to repo.updateStatus FSM guard; illegal transition -> 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION (V-CLN-008). On delivered transition (and only when it changed) writes lab_order.completed audit (DE-015). Sets deliveredAt/fittedAt/cancelledAt timestamps per transition. Non-status edits update detail fields. 404 if not found. NOTE: status progression is NOT blocked by locked/completed visit (lab fabrication is external).

items.title: Update post-op template
items.notes: updatePostopTemplate.ts. Dentist role gate. Partial update of category/title/content/active (incl. soft-disable via active=false). 404 if template not found in branch.

items.title: Update prescription / dispense or cancel (FSM)
items.notes: updatePrescription.ts. EM-CLI-012: when body.status present, routes to repo.updateStatus FSM guard (invalid transition -> 422 INVALID_PRESCRIPTION_TRANSITION). Status progression (pending->dispensed/cancelled) is EXEMPT from the locked/completed-visit block (external pharmacy event). Non-status field edits ARE blocked once visit is locked/completed (BR-003 VISIT_IMMUTABLE). 404 if prescription not found. Branch role gate.

items.title: Approve erasure → run anonymize engine
items.notes: DATA_GOVERNANCE §3. physicalDeleteErasedFiles (erasure-storage.ts) runs at HANDLER scope AFTER anonymization commits + is audited. Per-file fail-open: StorageProvider.deleteFile re-throws on S3 error → that file left PENDING (row kept so the handle survives), logged at ERROR. deleteStoredFileRowsByIds (storage facade) removes only rows for objects actually deleted. Idempotent retry. Appends erasure.s3_deleted audit. Storage absent → warn + leave pending. The whole physical-delete step never fails the erasure.

items.title: Request data erasure (file right-to-erasure)
items.notes: anonymizeImagingByPerson(Detailed): nulls dicom_metadata (PatientName/ID/DOB), finding.note, annotation label text; archives studies+images; RETAINS modality/spacing/ceph measurements. Idempotent. Returns fileIdsPendingS3Delete for the storage service to physically delete S3 objects (facade cannot reach S3). Erasure engine imports ONLY this facade (MODULE_BOUNDARIES).

items.title: Reject erasure request with a reason
items.notes: operationId rejectErasure → rejectErasureHandler → service.rejectErasure. Marks a `requested` row `rejected` with rejectionReason; mutates NO subject data. Audits erasure.rejected (compliance). Admin-only. Compliance-critical terminal transition → full layer set.

items.title: Batch upsert ceph landmarks + inline recompute
items.notes: Idempotent upsert (onConflictDoUpdate). AI-sourced landmarks may NOT be written confirmed/locked (422 AI_LANDMARK_CANNOT_AUTOCONFIRM). Sign-off split: assistant draft-only; confirmed/locked attempt by non-signoff → 403 ASSISTANT_CANNOT_FINALIZE. Inline recompute → returns {items, analysis}. Addon tier required.

items.title: Create immutable versioned ceph report (sign-off)
items.notes: Report gate D-L: A,B,Go,Po must all be confirmed/locked else 422 REPORT_GATE_UNCONFIRMED. Sign-off split: assistant→403 ASSISTANT_CANNOT_FINALIZE; non-member→404. Frozen JSON snapshot (landmarks/measurements/analysis/calibration provenance/prepared_by/finalized_by). Calibration pinned to versioned record (G6). Per-image advisory lock (4001) + unique(imageId,version) makes concurrent finalize race-safe and serializes revision lineage. Returns 201.

items.title: Delete ceph landmark (lock-protected)
items.notes: Delete permitted on placed/confirmed; locked → 422 LANDMARK_LOCKED. Non-member → 404. Addon tier required. Returns 204.

items.title: Auto-detect ceph landmarks (AI, kill-switch gated)
items.notes: Gate order: auth → feature flag dentalImagingAutoLandmark OFF→403 FEATURE_DISABLED (kill-switch) → existence/branch→404 → addon tier→403 → modality must be cephalometric→422 INVALID_MODALITY. AI predictions ALWAYS persist as source='ai' status='placed' (never auto-confirm, plan §4). Provider failure → status='failed' (never 500). PHI-safe audit (counts/modelVersion only, no pixels/coords).

items.title: Recompute ceph analysis (idempotent, precondition-gated)
items.notes: Idempotent — writes imagingCephAnalyses only, never a report row (D-I). Per-analysis reference-landmark precondition: missing reference set → 422 INSUFFICIENT_LANDMARKS (Steiner=S,N; Ricketts/Downs/Tweed/McNamara=Po,Or,N; Jarabak=S,N,Go,Me). Uncalibrated/null pixelSpacing → 422 NOT_CALIBRATED (clinical safety, no all-null 200). Returns single CephAnalysis. Audited (DE-020 marker).

items.title: Create + persist ceph superimposition
items.notes: Same compute/guards as preview (v1-only reference, same-patient, landmark sufficiency, addon tier) + persists imaging_ceph_superimposition row and emits imaging_ceph_superimposition.created audit (ADR-006 marker). Returns 201 with honesty label.

items.title: Preview ceph superimposition (compute, no persist)
items.notes: v1 cranial-base (S-N) similarity registration only — non-v1 reference → 422 SUPERIMPOSITION_NOT_IMPLEMENTED. Both reports must belong to SAME patient → 422 SUPERIMPOSITION_PATIENT_MISMATCH (PII/clinical safety). Insufficient/degenerate registration landmarks → 422. mm deltas gated on calibration of both timepoints. Mandatory clinical-honesty label surfaced. Addon tier (non-member→404). Clinical interpretation safety.

items.title: Update single ceph landmark (transition + lock guard)
items.notes: Coordinate change on locked → 422 LANDMARK_LOCKED. Status transition guarded by CEPH_LANDMARK_TRANSITIONS (invalid → 422 INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION). P1-10 provenance: editing AI coords flips source ai→ai_corrected; confirming preserves source. Sign-off split (assistant→403). Inline recompute → {items, analysis}. Addon tier.

items.title: Create imaging finding (SM-01)

userEntryPoint.control: New Finding form (type chips/select + status + tooth + surfaces + note) → "Add Finding"

items.notes: Creates imaging_finding (15 finding types, optional tooth/surfaces/note/annotationId/treatmentId/frameIndex). Default status draft (FINDING_INITIAL_STATUS). Validates annotationId belongs to the image. Clinical PHI; audited (imaging_finding.create / .confirmed if created confirmed = DE-019 marker).

items.title: Create measurement/annotation overlay
items.notes: Geometry validated via Zod discriminated union (distance/angle/area/label/arrow/freehand/shape/tooth). Measurement types (distance/angle/area) require tier != 'free' (annotations unrestricted, D3). Geometry stored as JSON, never burned into image (BR-023). Audited as imaging_annotation.create.

items.title: Create imaging study + presigned upload URL
items.notes: Creates imaging_study + imaging_study_image rows and returns presigned PUT (or S3 multipart for large DICOM) upload URL with 5-min expiry. Role-gated to dentist_owner/dentist_associate/hygienist/dental_assistant. Persists DICOM-tag-derived pixelSpacingMm calibration provenance. Emits imaging_study.create audit row (ADR-006 event marker, DE-018).

items.title: Delete imaging finding
items.notes: Re-fetches finding→image→study→assertBranchRole before delete (T-11-04). Returns 204. Non-member → 404 (anti-enumeration).

items.title: Soft-delete (archive) an image
items.notes: Soft-delete sets status='archived' (no physical row removal). Returns 204. Clinical patient data.

items.title: Delete an image context link
items.notes: Resolves link→image→study→assertBranchRole before delete.

items.title: Delete measurement/annotation

userEntryPoint.control: MeasurementShape / AnnotationShape onDelete (click the shape's delete affordance)

items.notes: Verifies branch membership via annotation→image→study (T-08-06). Returns 204.

items.title: Finalize CBCT study (server-side DICOM parse → volume metadata)
items.notes: Parses DICOM bytes server-side, populates volume columns (spacing/sliceThickness/frameCount/UIDs), sets is_volume, modality→cbct. Clinical-safety: malformed/non-DICOM payload clean-fails 422 INVALID_DICOM leaving NO half-written volume state. Emits imaging_study.cbct_finalize audit. dentist-only finalize (stricter than create).

items.title: Set image pixel-spacing calibration (scalar or 2-point ruler)
items.notes: No tier gate. G6: when pointA/pointB/knownDistanceMm given, persists a first-class VERSIONED calibration record and derives pixelSpacingMm = knownDistanceMm/pixelDistance server-side (client value ignored for integrity). Ruler body is all-or-nothing (partial → 422). Clinical measurement accuracy.

items.title: Update imaging finding (SM-01 transition)
items.notes: Re-verifies ownership via finding→image→study→branchId (T-11-03). Zod strips extras. Status transition guarded by FINDING_TRANSITIONS. draft→confirmed emits imaging_finding.confirmed audit (DE-019 marker). Clinical PHI.

items.title: Update image library metadata (diagnostic/quality/tags)
items.notes: G5 partial update: isDiagnostic, qualityStatus (ok|retake), retakeReason (trim/clamp 500), tags (trim/dedupe/clamp 50 chars, cap 30). Empty patch → 422. No tier gate.

items.title: Reclassify image modality
items.notes: Reclassifies imaging_study_image.modality. Role-gated clinical write.

items.title: Place a legal hold on a subject
items.notes: operationId placeLegalHold. Creates a dental_legal_hold row in status 'active'. Runs inside db.transaction with a per-subject advisory xact lock (ns 1003, hashtext(subjectPersonId)) to serialize against approveErasure/rejectErasure on the same subject — closes the hold-vs-erasure race. Writes a compliance audit event legal_hold.placed (resourceType legal_hold, eventType compliance, metadata {subjectPersonId, reason}). Patient-safety/compliance + inter-module (governance) => full layer set.

items.title: Release an active legal hold
items.notes: operationId releaseLegalHold. Transitions an active hold to 'released', stamping releasedBy/releasedAt/updatedBy. Writes compliance audit event legal_hold.released. Releasing then permits a fresh erasure request to anonymize the subject. Compliance/governance inter-module => full layer set.

items.title: Create a branch under an organization
items.notes: EF-ORG-001: only the org owner may add branches; missing org → 404; non-owner → 403. Persists workingHours JSON. Audited branch.create.

items.title: Merge-update branch settings (owner-only config)
items.notes: FR8.13: assertBranchAccess + dentist_owner only (active membership role check, else 403). Free-form JSONB top-level merge (accepts {settings:...} or raw body). Audited branch_settings.update (only changedKeys in metadata, not values). Drives BR-054 tax, BR-055 BIR, BR-048 terms, etc.

items.title: Create a consent-form template

userEntryPoint.control: '+ Add Template' -> name (ct-name) / body (ct-body) / 'Requires witness signature' -> 'Save Template'

items.notes: FR8.13: assertBranchAccess + dentist_owner-only (else 403). name+body required; requiresWitnessSignature default false. Audited consent_template.create (templateName non-PHI; body not logged). Returns bare created object 201.

items.title: Soft-delete a consent-form template
items.notes: dentist_owner-only. Soft-delete (active=false); must belong to branch (else 404). Audited consent_template.delete (softDelete:true). Returns empty object 200.

items.title: Update a consent-form template

userEntryPoint.control: 'Edit' on a template row -> editor -> 'Save Template'

items.notes: dentist_owner-only. Template must belong to the branch (cross-branch id → 404, no leak). Partial update. Audited consent_template.update (changedKeys).

items.title: Set a per-branch CDT price override
items.notes: Financially material (WF-025). dentist_owner-only — checked BEFORE CDT existence so validity is not leaked to under-privileged callers. priceCents int 0..999999. Unknown CDT → INVALID_CDT_CODE. Merges into branch.settings.feeSchedule. Audited fee_schedule.update (cdtCode+price in non-PHI metadata).

items.title: Create a branch staff member (canonical)
items.notes: Canonical create. dentist_owner-only with owner-bootstrap exception (owner may create FIRST membership while holding none; that membership is linked to user.id). Validates role against VALID_MEMBER_ROLES; branchId from query or body. Enforces FR6.3 tier limits under advisory lock (see member-tier-limit-race). No create-time PIN. Strips pinHash from response. Audited membership.create (role-only metadata, no PII).

items.title: Create membership (deprecated branch-scoped route)
items.notes: DEPRECATED (RFC 8594, Sunset 2026-09-01) duplicate of createMember. EM-ORG-001 dentist_owner-only with owner-bootstrap; tier-limit check (no advisory lock here — non-atomic check-then-act); sets Deprecation/Sunset/Link headers. Prefer POST /dental/org/members.

items.title: Deactivate a member (flat route)
items.notes: assertBranchRole dentist_owner on the member's branch; missing member → 404. Returns 204. Audited membership.deactivate.

items.title: Deactivate a membership (nested route)
items.notes: EF-ORG-004/G7-S1 IDOR guard: org owners may deactivate any member; branch-level callers must hold dentist_owner on the target branch (resolved via branch→org). G7-S2: strips pinHash/securityAnswerHash/securityQuestion from response. Audited membership.deactivate.

items.title: Recover a locked-out member's PIN via security question
items.notes: CF-39/AUTH-03: MUST be authenticated (device owner holds session) to prevent internet brute-force. newPin 4-6 digits. assertBranchAccess. Locked-out → 429. No security question OR wrong answer → uniform 401 {success:false} (no info leak); wrong answer shares the PIN lockout counter (recordFailedPinAttempt). Correct → reset attempts + set new PIN.

items.title: Owner resets a member's PIN (flat)
items.notes: Two-call create→reset-pin flow (decision #9): the only path that writes a member PIN besides set-pin. newPin must be exactly 6 digits. assertBranchAccess + dentist_owner-only of same branch (else 403). Hashes PIN and resets failed-attempt/lockout counters.

items.title: Set a member's PIN (nested)
items.notes: CF-38/AUTH-02 assertBranchAccess; EM-ORG-002: only the target member themselves OR a dentist_owner may set the PIN, else 403. PIN hashed via Bun.password.hash; pinHash stripped from response. Audited (security) membership.set_pin.

items.title: Set a member's PIN-recovery security question
items.notes: FR9.7. answer min 3 chars. assertBranchAccess. Caller must be the member themselves OR a dentist_owner of the same branch (else 403). Answer hashed (bcrypt cost 10, lowercased+trimmed). Returns {success, question}.

items.title: Update a member's display name, role, avatar, or provider credentials
items.notes: assertBranchAccess for the member's branch. G7-S3/P1-5: role changes AND provider-credential writes (licenseNumber/npi/credentialType/licenseExpiry) require caller be dentist_owner; otherwise 403. NPI must be exactly 10 digits; licenseExpiry ISO datetime. Refine: at least one field. Role change audited fail-closed with before/after. Strips pinHash.

items.title: Verify a member's PIN (local device login)

userEntryPoint.control: Numeric keypad (aria-label "PIN keypad"); auto-submits at 6 digits
