items.notes: CF-38/AUTH-02 assertBranchAccess. Locked-out → 429 with lockedUntil. No pinHash set → {success:false}. Correct → resets attempts, trackLastLogin (FR6.4/EM-ORG-020 activity), audited (authentication) membership.verify_pin. Wrong → recordFailedPinAttempt; crossing threshold → 429. Audit failure never blocks login.

items.title: Owner activates a provisional clinic (go-live / terms acceptance)
items.notes: C-1/ADR-007: flips org status provisional→live, unlocking PHI writes (gated by assert-org-live in dental-visit/dental-patient). Owner-only; admin/member cannot activate. Idempotent (already-live → 200). suspended → 403 ORG_SUSPENDED (ops-only). Audited org.activate.

items.title: Admin create organization
items.notes: EM-ORG-002: admin-only (user.role==='admin'). Creates org with active=true. Audited org.create (actorRole admin). Seeds default retention policies. ownerPersonId = the admin caller.

items.title: Self-service clinic onboarding (org + branch + owner membership)

userEntryPoint.control: Get Started button (onboarding-wizard final step) / Skip for now

items.notes: Transactional: creates dental_organization (status='provisional', active=true, ownerPersonId=caller), default dental_branch, and caller's dentist_owner membership. Returns {organizationId, branchId, membershipId} 201. Seeds default retention policies (best-effort). Audited org.onboard with real actor role (never hardcoded admin). Distinct from admin POST /dental/organizations.

items.title: Update organization settings
items.notes: EM-ORG-004: owner-only mutation (ownerPersonId===user.id) checked BEFORE any write; missing org → 404; non-owner → 403 (prevents IDOR PATCH of another org by guessing id).

items.title: Update feature-permission overrides
items.notes: P2-17 owner-only (else 403). 1-200 overrides. Each override validated against the catalog (unknown feature → 400). Owner-lockout guard: refuse dentist_owner staff.manage=false (400). Additive upsert (absent row → catalog default). Audited permission.update. Returns recomputed grid.

items.title: Update branch working hours
items.notes: updateWorkingHours. 404 if branch absent. assertBranchRole(['dentist_owner']) — owner-only. Zod-validated per-day schedule (HH:MM regex, enabled flag) → 422 on bad shape. Persists JSON via updateBranchWorkingHours facade (dental-org).

items.title: Accept case presentation (patient e-signature)
items.notes: P1-20: terminal decision (PRESENTATION_DECIDED 422 if already decided, incl race). FSM guard plan presented→approved (PLAN_INVALID_TRANSITION). linkPendingTreatments + recomputeTotal; immutable consent e-sig hung off plan visit (PLAN_HAS_NO_ITEMS if none); createApproval (method signature, approver=patient.personId); plan→approved (+status-history); decide accepted. Audit case_presentation.accepted before/after.

items.title: Accept one alternate treatment option
items.notes: P1-19: chosen treatment → planned; non-terminal siblings in the group → declined (mirrors informed-refusal). Group existence (404), chosen must be in group (OPTION_NOT_IN_GROUP). assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked.

items.title: Accept treatment plan (decline/accept items)

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Treatment Plan icon → data-testid=accept-plan-btn

items.notes: Authorizes against PATIENT's branch (V-VIS-011, not query branchId); PATIENT_ARCHIVED block; consentFormId validated to belong to patient BEFORE snapshot (no orphan version); buildLivePlan snapshot of diagnosed/planned across visits; createSnapshotVersion (append-only, version-collision retry, deliberately un-tx'd); links consent form to new version.

items.title: Add follow-up note (append-only)
items.notes: FR2.12: re-export shim → followUpNotes.ts (the prior divergent copy dropped the archived write-block). Append to JSONB array + flag needsFollowUp. V-PAT-013 text 5-2000 chars. V-PAT-003 roles staff_full/associate/owner; branchless DENIES. EF-PAT-001 archived blocked. Append-only (BR-015c: no PATCH/DELETE).

items.title: Add household member
items.notes: P1-27: household 404; assertBranchAccess on household branch. Member must belong to household branch (MEMBER_BRANCH_MISMATCH), not archived, not already in a household (ALREADY_IN_HOUSEHOLD). Default relationship dependent, isGuarantor false.

items.title: Approve treatment plan (patient sign-off)
items.notes: CR-05/TP-BR-005: only presented or already-approved plans are approvable (PLAN_NOT_APPROVABLE). Writes append-only approval record (who/method/consentFormId), linkPendingTreatments (binds items), moves presented→approved (+status-history), recomputeStatus + recomputeTotal (TP-BR-006). Fail-closed audit treatment_plan.approved with before/after.

items.title: Archive patient (EC1 guard)
items.notes: dentist_owner only (EM-PAT-002); branchless 403. Optional reason → archiveNote (EM-PAT-003). EC1: active-payment-plan blocks archive (ARCHIVE_BLOCKED 422 via repo reason). Already-archived → 409 PATIENT_ALREADY_ARCHIVED (V-PAT-009). Audited patient.archive.

items.title: Bulk archive patients
items.notes: V-PAT-012: body { ids[1-50], reason[5-500] } self-validated (400 on invalid). dentist_owner required on every unique branch. Per-patient result {id,success,reason?} with EC1 guard applied per row; successCount/failCount tally.

items.title: Create case presentation (from presented plan)
items.notes: P1-20: mint patient-facing presentation in draft bound to plan (+optional version). Plan MUST be 'presented' (PLAN_NOT_PRESENTED). E1 role gate owner/associate/treatment_coordinator; branchless 403; archived blocked. Phase-2 public token deferred.

items.title: Create insurance claim draft
items.notes: Claim created in draft. insuranceProfileId must belong to patient (BusinessLogicError). assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked. Captures cdtCode/icd10/fee. (HMO LOA validity gate BR-056/057 lives in billing createInsuranceClaim path; this is the draft.)

items.title: Create coverage authorization (HMO LOA)
items.notes: P1-26: HMO Letter-of-Authorization captured pre-treatment, created requested (or approved when code+amount up front). insuranceProfileId must belong to patient. branchId from patient. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked. Backs the LOA coverage cap/copay split (BR-057) and validity gate (BR-056) used at claim filing.

items.title: Create dental alert

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Alerts icon / data-testid=dental-alerts-sheet → New Alert → Save Alert

items.notes: alt01: active true by default; severity default medium. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked (EF-PAT-001). Surfaces in top-bar safety badges.

items.title: Register dental patient
items.notes: Creates person + patient (status active). consentGiven must be true (CONSENT_REQUIRED 422) and persisted on person.consent; displayName non-empty; branchId required; assertBranchRole owner/associate/staff_full; assertOrgLive (provisional clinics blocked); non-blocking duplicate-detection warning (findDuplicateDentalPatients). Audit patient.registered.

items.title: Create household (family file)
items.notes: P1-27: guarantor becomes first member (self, isGuarantor). assertBranchAccess on branchId. Guarantor must be a real patient in this branch (GUARANTOR_BRANCH_MISMATCH), not archived (PATIENT_ARCHIVED), not already in a household (ALREADY_IN_HOUSEHOLD — at-most-one-household invariant). Atomic createWithGuarantor. Audit household.created.

items.title: Create insurance profile
items.notes: Active by default; relationship default self; payerType default hmo; PH payer fields (accredited/annualLimitCents). assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked (EF-PAT-001).

items.title: Create patient contact (guardian/emergency)
items.notes: AC-001/008/009, PAT-BR-002 guardian linkage for minors. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked. Audit patient.contact.create.

items.title: Create recall (recare)

userEntryPoint.control: recalls-tab-btn → RecallsSheet New Recall → Save Recall

items.notes: AC-001: created pending. type cleaning/checkup/treatment/other; optional intervalMonths (recurrence). assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked (EF-PAT-001).

items.title: Create sync log (local-first)
items.notes: AC-001/LF-BR-001: register a local-first sync entry, syncStatus pending. G1: branchId REQUIRED (400) — a branchless log bypassed authorization; assertBranchAccess unconditionally.

items.title: Create patient task

userEntryPoint.control: tasks-tab-btn → TasksSheet New Task → Save Task

items.notes: P2-003: created open. taskType follow_up/lab_order/referral/prescription/other. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked (EF-PAT-001).

items.title: Create treatment plan (draft)
items.notes: AC-001: creates plan header in draft. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived patient blocked (EF-PAT-001). Stamps cdtCodeSetYear (caller override else default). Seeds status-history (null→draft, P2-8).

items.title: Delete patient contact (soft)
items.notes: AC-004: soft-delete (204), 404 if not found. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked. Audit patient.contact.delete.

items.title: Unlink treatment item from appointment
items.notes: P1-21: clears the loose appointment ref. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked; treatment 404 if missing.

items.title: Export patients (CSV/JSON)
items.notes: FR2.8: branchId REQUIRED (400). dentist_owner only. format csv|json (response key `patients`); optional status filter; up to 10k rows; declared person subset (V-PAT-014). AL-006 audit patient.export with format/count.

items.title: Bulk import patients (CSV/JSON, all-or-nothing)
items.notes: FR7.2: parse { patients:[] } | { csv } (RFC-4180-aware tokenizer) or legacy array/text-csv. Validate ALL rows up front (422 with errors). dentist_owner required on EVERY unique branchId (V-XRI-001) BEFORE the all-or-nothing db.transaction. Untrusted input fails closed with specific 4xx never 500 (V-XRI-002). 422 on transaction failure (rollback).

items.title: Initialize dentition (age-based auto-populate)
items.notes: FR1.19: age from DOB drives deciduous(≤5)/mixed(≤12)/permanent(>12) ISO-3950 tooth set, all healthy. Branch from the linked visit (404 if visit missing); assertBranchRole owner/associate/dental_assistant (assistant may scaffold healthy teeth under supervision). Upserts dentition chart.

items.title: Reject case presentation

userEntryPoint.control: data-testid=reject-btn ("Decline this plan") → reject-confirm-btn ("Confirm decline") + Rejection reason textarea

items.notes: P1-20: terminal decision (PRESENTATION_DECIDED if already decided). FSM guard plan presented→rejected (terminal). Persists optional reason; decide rejected. Branchless 403; archived blocked; broad chairside set.

items.title: Remove household member
items.notes: P1-27: household 404; assertBranchAccess. Guarantor cannot be removed (GUARANTOR_NOT_REMOVABLE). Archived member frozen — cannot be removed (PATIENT_ARCHIVED, EF-PAT-001 symmetry). Member 404 if not present.

items.title: Restore archived patient
items.notes: dentist_owner only; branchless 403. Restores archived → active (RESTORE_BLOCKED on repo failure). FR2.7.

items.title: Update claim status (FSM)
items.notes: CLAIM_DRAFT_FSM: draft→ready→submitted→accepted/rejected; rejected→draft; accepted terminal (INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION). submitted stamps submittedAt. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked. Fail-closed audit claim.status_changed before/after (billing-sensitive).

items.title: Update patient communication consent
items.notes: Merges only the supplied channels (sms/email/phone/marketing) onto persons.consent; preserves registrationConsent + capturedAt, refreshes channelsUpdatedAt. Returns updated consent or null. Supports consent revocation (WF-035). Privacy-sensitive.

items.title: Update coverage authorization status (FSM)
items.notes: COVERAGE_AUTH_FSM: requested→approved/denied; approved→partial/expired; partial→expired; denied/expired terminal (INVALID_STATUS_TRANSITION). approved/partial may also set approvedAmountCents + coveredProcedures + stamp approvedAt. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked.

items.title: Update dental alert
items.notes: alt01: update severity/description/active. Alert 404 if missing. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked.

items.title: Update patient demographics / status / contact
items.notes: Demographics (name/DOB/gender) live on linked person, merged partially; contactInfo (phone/email) partial-merge + audited (patient.contact.update, keys not values). Archived patient blocked 403 PATIENT_ARCHIVED; branchless patient denied; assertBranchRole owner/associate/hygienist/staff_full; status=archived restricted to dentist_owner. DOB validated; gender allow-list; returns declared person subset (V-PAT-014).

items.title: Update insurance profile
items.notes: Partial update; profile must belong to patient (404). assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked.

items.title: Update patient contact
items.notes: AC-003/010: contact 404 if not found. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked. Audit patient.contact.update.

items.title: Update recall (FSM + recurrence seeding)

userEntryPoint.control: RecallsSheet RecallRow Mark Sent / Complete / Cancel

items.notes: RECALL_FSM: pending→sent/cancelled; sent→completed/cancelled; completed/cancelled terminal (RECALL_INVALID_TRANSITION). sent→sentAt, completed→completedAt. P1-24/D4: completing a recurring recall (intervalMonths>0) seeds next-cycle pending recall (addMonths). assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked.

items.title: Update sync log (FSM + stale-write conflict)
items.notes: AC-003/LF-BR-003/004: SYNC_FSM pending→syncing/failed; syncing→synced/failed; failed→syncing; synced terminal (SYNC_INVALID_TRANSITION). synced→lastSyncAt. G1 branchless row immutable (BRANCH_ACCESS_DENIED) + assertBranchAccess on row branch. LF-BR-004 optimistic-lock: version mismatch → 409 CONFLICT with conflictPayload.

items.title: Update patient task (FSM)
items.notes: P2-003: TASK_FSM open→in_progress/cancelled; in_progress→done/cancelled; done/cancelled terminal (TASK_INVALID_TRANSITION). done→completedAt. assertPatientBranchAccess; archived blocked.

items.title: Update treatment plan (FSM + money recompute)
items.notes: AC-003..008: TREATMENT_PLAN_FSM guard (PLAN_INVALID_TRANSITION). Branch-access floor on every PATCH (I1 closes cross-tenant hole); archived blocked. Transition to presented role-gated owner/associate/treatment_coordinator (E1) + sets presentedAt + linkPendingTreatments (G1). Transition to approved sets approvedAt. TP-BR-006: server-derives totalEstimateCents from linked item prices (recomputeTotal). Status-history row on change.

items.title: Complete/finalize perio chart with summary + 2017 staging
items.notes: Already completed/locked → 409 CHART_COMPLETED. Parent visit not completed/locked (422 VISIT_LOCKED). Min readings (16 adult / 8 primary inferred) → 422 INSUFFICIENT_READINGS. Computes BoP%, mean depth, deep-pocket count (>=5mm), classifies 2017 AAP/EFP stage/grade/extent, freezes diagnosis on chart, writes perio.chart.completed audit row. Optional risk-factor body.

items.title: Create perio chart for a visit
items.notes: Resolves visit via getVisitOrThrow; enforces one-chart-per-visit (409 CHART_EXISTS), visit-writable (422 VISIT_LOCKED), clinical role on branch, patientId==visit.patientId (PATIENT_VISIT_MISMATCH), examiner membership (404 if none). Creates draft chart, returns 201 with empty readings, writes perio.chart.created audit row.

items.title: Record/update a tooth-level periodontal reading
items.notes: Validates FDI tooth, depths/recession, mobility/furcation grades, gingival margins BEFORE state checks. Chart must be draft (409 CHART_COMPLETED), parent visit not completed/locked (422 VISIT_IMMUTABLE), clinical role. Atomic onConflictDoUpdate writing only present columns; returns reading + derived per-site CAL.

items.title: Export whole-patient continuity-of-care record (FHIR R4 Bundle)

userEntryPoint.control: Export Care Record / Records Release button

items.notes: exportPatientCareRecord (P2-18). Aggregates all non-superseded per-visit PMD snapshots into one FHIR R4 'document' Bundle (Composition+Patient+per-visit Encounter/Condition/Procedure/MedicationRequest) via the pure buildCareRecordBundle. Returned as application/fhir+json attachment. Writes pmd.export audit (continuity-of-care). Patient-self export allowed (HIPAA right-of-access).

items.title: Export / download a single visit's PMD as a JSON file
items.notes: exportPMD (FR12.6). Returns the most-recent non-superseded PMD as an attachment (application/json, filename pmd-<visit8>-<date>.json). PHI data-movement: writes pmd.export audit row. Patient-self download allowed (EF-PMD-007).

items.title: Generate PMD from a completed/locked visit
items.notes: generatePMD handler. Builds a checksum-sealed JSON snapshot (visit + demographics + safetyFloor + treatments + prescriptions) and persists an immutable pmd_document (status 'generated'). Returns 201. Pulls cross-module data via read-only facades getTreatmentsForPMD/getPrescriptionsForPMD/getSafetyFloorForPMD/getPatientDemographicsForPMD. Clinical/patient-safety -> all four layers.

items.title: Import an external PMD record (read-only ingestion)
items.notes: importPMD. Stores external PMD verbatim linked to a patient. Branch authz via patient.preferredBranchId. Writes pmd.import audit (PHI ingestion / data provenance). Returns 201 with safetyFloorMerged boolean.

items.title: Merge imported PMD safety-floor items into patient medical history
items.notes: mergeImportedPMDSafetyFloor (FIX-003 / decision #20). Extracts top-level conditions/medications/allergies string arrays (mirrors FE preview) and APPEND-ONLY inserts them into the patient's medical history via insertImportedSafetyFloorEntries; imported_pmd row is never mutated (BR-022). Records an append-only merge event + sets safetyFloorMerged flag. Writes pmd.safety_floor.merged audit. Patient-safety -> all four layers.

items.title: Patient views own outstanding balance roll-up (GET /me/balance)
items.notes: operationId getMyBalance. Self-scoped balance aggregation mirroring staff getPatientBalance but excluding voided AND uncollectible invoices from the roll-up. Returns totalBilledCents, totalPaidCents, outstandingBalanceCents, overdueAmountCents (sum of balanceCents where status='overdue'), invoiceCount. Derived patientId only. Money invariant + patient-facing + inter-module → full layer set.

items.title: Patient views own appointments (GET /me/appointments)
items.notes: operationId listMyAppointments. Self-scoped portal read; patientId derived server-side via resolveSelfPatientIdOrThrow (no client-supplied id). Returns live (non-archived) appointments newest-first via getAppointmentsByPatientId facade. Patient-appropriate projection only (id, branchId, startAt, endAt, visitType, status, confirmedAt). authMiddleware roles:['user']; unauth → 401, staff-only (no patient row) → 403. Patient-facing/clinical-adjacent + inter-module → full layer set.

items.title: Patient views own invoices (GET /me/invoices)
items.notes: operationId listMyInvoices. Self-scoped portal read via resolveSelfPatientIdOrThrow + getInvoicesByPatientId facade. Voided AND uncollectible (written-off) invoices filtered out. Projection limited to invoiceNumber, status, amounts (totalCents/paidCents/balanceCents), dueDate, issuedAt; internal fields (dentistMemberId, discountedBy, discountReason, uncollectibleAt, line items) excluded. Money + patient-facing + inter-module → full layer set.

items.title: Cancel appointment (DELETE)

userEntryPoint.control: Cancel hover button -> CancelAppointmentDialog (Cancel appointment submit)

items.notes: cancelAppointment. assertBranchRole(['dentist_owner','staff_full']). FSM-guarded (only scheduled/confirmed/checked_in cancellable → else 422). Write through withTenantTx([branchId]). AL-008 audit + P1-24 synchronous reminder expiry + DE-011 AppointmentCancelled event. Returns 204. BR-004: an already-created visit survives cancellation (no hard-delete path).

items.title: Staff confirm appointment (P1-24)

userEntryPoint.control: Confirm hover button on appointment card (aria-label Confirm <patient>)

items.notes: confirmAppointment. assertBranchRole(['dentist_owner','dentist_associate','staff_full','staff_scheduling']). FSM-guarded (scheduled→confirmed only; else 422). repo.confirm sets confirmedVia='staff' (WHERE status='scheduled'). Write through withTenantTx([branchId]). Synchronously expires queued reminders (P1-24).

items.title: Patient self-confirm via reminder link token (public, single-use)
items.notes: confirmAppointmentByToken. Unauthenticated; the single-use confirmationToken is the bearer. confirmByToken sets status=confirmed, confirmedVia='link', and CLEARS the token (WHERE token matches AND status='scheduled') so a replay 404s. Rate-limited (bookingWriteLimiter by IP). Returns PII-minimal view (status + window). Expires queued reminders on success.

items.title: Create appointment (book)
items.notes: createAppointment. Creates a 'scheduled' dental_appointment. Overlap-check read + insert atomic in withTenantTx([branchId]). Emits AC-NOTIF-01 booking.created (best-effort) + DE-010 AppointmentBooked event (best-effort) + AL-009 audit. Facade calls: getPatientForDentalPatient (dental-patient), getBranchSchedulingConfig (dental-org), notifs.createNotification, scheduler.trigger.

items.title: Create soft slot hold (public, short-TTL)
items.notes: createBookingHold (P1-25). Public, rate-limited. Validates slot bookable: config.enabled, isOnlineBookable(visitType), eligible provider, lead-time (SLOT_TOO_SOON), horizon (SLOT_BEYOND_HORIZON), working hours (OUTSIDE_WORKING_HOURS). Inside withTenantTx([branchId]): re-check appointments (SLOT_TAKEN 409) + active holds (SLOT_HELD 409) then createOne with 5-min TTL + sessionToken. Returns 201 {holdId, sessionToken, window, expiresAt}.

items.title: Create queue item for appointment
items.notes: createQueueItem. Resolves appointment (404 if absent) → assertBranchAccess on its branch. Write through withTenantTx([branchId]); status defaults to 'waiting', copies patientId/branchId from appointment. Returns 201. (Check-in also auto-enqueues; this is the explicit manual path.)

items.title: Add patient to branch waitlist (ASAP fill)
items.notes: createWaitlistEntry. assertBranchRole(['dentist_owner','dentist_associate','staff_full','staff_scheduling']). P1-6 cross-tenant guard: getPatientForDentalPatient → assertPatientBranchAccess (404 unknown, 403 foreign-branch). Entry starts status='active', urgency default 'routine'. Write through withTenantTx([branchId]). Returns 201.

items.title: List appointments (calendar window)
items.notes: listAppointments. Joins patient+person for patientName. Read scoped through withTenantTx([branchId]). V-SCH-004: branchId + date_from + date_to required (422 if missing); 31-day range cap; date_to >= date_from; page/per_page pagination (default 50, max 200). assertBranchAccess on requested branch. Optional providerId/patientId/status filters.

items.title: Self-service online booking → real appointment (P1-25)
items.notes: createOnlineBooking. Public, rate-limited. Commits a REAL dental_appointment (status 'scheduled', source 'online', confirmationState 'pending', unguessable confirmationCode) that flows through normal check-in→visit lifecycle. matchOrCreatePatientForOnlineBooking BEFORE the commit tx (dental-patient facade). AL audit (channel online) + booking.created notif. Fixed ONLINE_BOOKING_ACTOR_ID as createdBy.

items.title: Promote waitlist entry → booked appointment
items.notes: promoteWaitlistEntry. assertBranchRole(scheduling roles). Atomically (one withTenantTx([branchId])): create 'scheduled' appointment + mark entry 'scheduled' linking the appointment. Soft double-booking warning (parity with create). Provider = override > entry.preferredProviderId (required, else 422); visitType = override > entry.visitType (must be valid enum). endAt>startAt. AL audit (waitlist.promote). Returns 201 {entry, appointment}.

items.title: Update / reschedule appointment + status transitions

userEntryPoint.control: No Show hover button on appointment card (aria-label Mark <patient> as no-show)

items.notes: PATCH {status:'no_show'} → markNoShow (scheduled/confirmed/checked_in → no_show, stamps noShowAt). Reversible: PATCH {status:'completed'} from no_show → revertNoShow (PP-1). completed via PATCH is ONLY valid from no_show; checked_in→completed must go via visit checkout (else 422). Expires queued reminders on no_show.

items.title: Transition queue item status (queue FSM)
items.notes: updateQueueItemStatus. Resolves item (404) → assertBranchAccess. QUEUE_ITEM_FSM: waiting→{called,cancelled}; called→{in_progress,cancelled}; in_progress→{completed,cancelled}; completed/cancelled terminal. Invalid transition → 422 INVALID_FSM_TRANSITION. Stamps calledAt/startedAt/completedAt on the matching transition. Write through withTenantTx([branchId]).

items.title: Apply template to visit (create treatments)
items.notes: Creates billable treatments so gated on clinical role (owner/associate), not mere branch access; VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; template must be active AND belong to the visit's branch (foreign-branch template -> 404, no cross-clinic pricing leak); creates planned treatments from template items.

items.title: Carry over / restore pending treatments into current visit
items.notes: Owner/associate gate; VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked target; explicit sourceVisitId must belong to same patient (INVALID_SOURCE_VISIT) else legacy auto-discovery (5 most recent); copies diagnosed/planned with carriedOver=true + sourceVisitId; restore-from-dismissed (status->planned); both write loops in ONE withTenantTx (atomic batch).

items.title: Convert finding to treatment (linked)
items.notes: Owner/associate gate; VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; finding must belong to visit (404); carries finding tooth/surface/condition into treatment; fee default from branch schedule when omitted; create treatment + linkTreatment in one db.transaction (no orphan / no double-create on retry).

items.title: Create clinical finding
items.notes: Role gate incl dental_assistant; conditionCode='other' requires a note; localId replay idempotency; VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; curated condition vocabulary (distinct from odontogram state).

items.title: Create dental treatment (diagnose)
items.notes: Owner/associate role gate; localId replay idempotency before immutability; VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; TOOTH_EXTRACTED guard (block treatment on extracted tooth); fee default from branch fee schedule (override > catalog default > 0) when priceCents omitted; treatment.diagnosed audit.

items.title: Create dental visit (draft)
items.notes: Creates draft visit; conditional role gate by visitType (general=owner/associate; hygiene also hygienist); assertOrgLive (provisional clinic block); resolves patient & asserts caller belongs to patient's branch (cross-tenant link guard); withTenantTx scoped to branchId; auto-seeds empty notes row atomically; writes visit.create audit.

items.title: Create treatment template

userEntryPoint.control: '+ Add Template' -> name (tt-name) / desc (tt-desc) / item rows (cdt/description/price/toothNumber) + '+ Add item' -> 'Save Template'

items.notes: Zod validation (name non-empty, branchId uuid, items non-empty); assertBranchAccess; created active with createdBy/updatedBy.

items.title: Append immutable addendum to signed note
items.notes: Owner/associate/hygienist gate; note must exist; NOTE_NOT_SIGNED guard (must be signed first); reason + content required; increments version; visit_note.amended audit with reason (snapshot JSON is the audit trail).

items.title: Deactivate treatment template (soft delete)
items.notes: 404 if missing; assertBranchAccess; sets active=false (soft delete, not a hard delete).

items.title: Discard (abandon) an open visit
items.notes: Owner-only escape hatch behind one-active-visit rule. Only active/draft discardable (VISIT_NOT_DISCARDABLE); refuses if performed/verified or billed treatments, signed consent, or attachments exist; dismisses open treatments + discards in one withTenantTx; reason required; fail-closed audit with before/after + dismissedTreatmentCount.

items.title: Resolve chart sync conflict (accept/dismiss)
items.notes: Clinician-only (assistant excluded); 404 if no open conflict; dismiss requires reason (5-500 chars); accept re-applies rejected teeth with a NEW higher clock so the offline edit wins, in one tx (merge+version+clearConflict); CONFLICT_ACCEPT_BLOCKED + rollback when an immutable existing-tier baseline (CHART-BR-002) blocks the bumped tooth.

items.title: Sign and lock SOAP notes
items.notes: Conditional sign roles (general=owner/associate; hygiene also hygienist); 404 if no note; NOTE_ALREADY_SIGNED guard; freezes v1 immutable snapshot; visit_note.signed audit (data-modification).

items.title: Update / resolve a finding
items.notes: Role gate incl dental_assistant; finding must belong to visit (404); 'other' must keep a note (considering merged next code/note); status='resolved' stops active rendering. Note: no completed/locked immutability gate on this path.

items.title: Update treatment (status FSM, dismiss, decline, perform)
items.notes: VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; performed/verified field-immutability (TREATMENT_IMMUTABLE); forward-only transition validation; consent required before performed (TREATMENT_CONSENT_REQUIRED); dismiss audited + plan recompute; decline requires refusalReason + audited + plan recompute; price locked at creation; recomputePlanForTreatment on status change; treatment.performed audit.

items.title: Update a single tooth (per-tooth PATCH)
items.notes: At-least-one-field validation; role gate incl dental_assistant; VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; 404 if no chart; merges full post-edit teeth into baseline (so single-tooth edit isn't dropped from carry-over); records sync conflict on stale-clock loss.

items.title: Update treatment template

userEntryPoint.control: 'Edit' on a template row -> editor (add/remove/patch items) -> 'Save Template'

items.notes: 404 if missing; assertBranchAccess off existing template's branch; partial patch of name/description/items/active.

items.title: Upsert full visit chart (odontogram save)
items.notes: Role gate incl dental_assistant; localId replay idempotency (short-circuits before immutability so a replay resolves even on completed/locked); VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; saveVersion snapshot; merges into patient baseline (clock-aware LWW); persists rejected stale teeth as durable sync conflict (syncStatus='conflict').

items.title: Draft / upsert SOAP notes

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Notes icon → SoapNotesSheet Save (aria-label=Save SOAP notes)

items.notes: Conditional draft roles (assistant always; hygienist only on hygiene visit); VISIT_IMMUTABLE on completed/locked; resolves active membership in branch (ForbiddenError if none) for authorMemberId; repo refuses upsert on signed note (NOTE_SIGNED).

items.title: Cancel a queued email
items.notes: cancelEmailQueueItem. Admin-only write. Requires non-empty reason <=500 chars; FSM guards: cannot cancel status='sent' (422 EMAIL_ALREADY_SENT) or already 'cancelled' (422 EMAIL_ALREADY_CANCELLED); records cancelledAt/cancelledBy/cancellationReason. 404 if missing.

items.title: Create email template
items.notes: createEmailTemplate. Admin-only write. Defaults status='draft'; sets createdBy/updatedBy; repo validates Handlebars syntax + variable definitions. Returns 201.

items.title: Get email queue item by id
items.notes: getEmailQueueItem. Admin-only read. 404 NotFound if missing. Read-only.

items.title: Get email template by id
items.notes: getEmailTemplate. Admin-only read. findOneById returns template in ANY status (active/draft/archived) since admin access; 404 NotFound if missing. Read-only.

items.title: List email queue items
items.notes: listEmailQueueItems. Admin-only read. Pagination (limit 50, max 200) + rich filters: status (single/CSV/array), template, templateTags (JSONB ?), recipientEmail, priority, scheduledOnly, dateFrom/dateTo. Read-only.

items.title: List email templates
items.notes: listEmailTemplates. Admin-only read. Pagination (limit 25, max 100) + filters status/tags (tags via JSONB @> containment). Read-only.

items.title: Retry a failed email
items.notes: retryEmailQueueItem. Admin-only write. FSM guard: only status='failed' can retry (else 422 INVALID_STATUS_FOR_RETRY); attempts<3 else 422 MAX_RETRIES_EXCEEDED; resets status='pending', clears nextRetryAt+lastError. 404 if missing.

items.title: Send test email for a template
items.notes: testEmailTemplate. Admin-only write. Requires recipientEmail (regex-validated); template must exist AND be active (getActiveTemplate) else 404; queues test email at priority 1 with metadata.isTestEmail/testedBy/testedAt. Returns {queue}.

items.title: Update email template
items.notes: updateEmailTemplate. Admin-only write. 404 if template missing; repo re-validates syntax/variables when content changes, bumps version, invalidates in-memory cache. Partial patch.

items.title: Create consultation note (draft)
items.notes: POST /emr/consultations, operationId createConsultation, role [provider]. Resolves+validates body.provider exists (404), caller's own provider profile (PROVIDER_NOT_FOUND 422), body.provider must equal caller (403), patient exists (404), optional context dup check (CONSULTATION_EXISTS), persists draft via createDirect with status='draft', externalDocumentation settable at create (V-EMR-008). Writes emr.consultation.create audit row (sentinel tenantId).

items.title: Finalize consultation note (terminal)
items.notes: POST /emr/consultations/{id}/finalize, operationId finalizeConsultation, role [provider:owner]. 404 if missing; provider-owner only (403); only draft finalizable (non-draft → CONSULTATION_NOT_DRAFT 422); finalizeNote stamps status='finalized', finalizedAt, finalizedBy=user.id. Sign-immutability: terminal, no amend. Writes emr.consultation.finalize audit row (V-EMR-002).

items.title: Read one consultation note (with expansion)
items.notes: GET /emr/consultations/{id}, operationId getConsultation, roles [admin, provider:owner, patient:owner]. 404 if missing; access = admin OR owning provider OR owning patient else 403. Optional expand=patient/provider/person composed via owning-module facades (no cross-module schema reach). Writes emr.consultation.read audit row (PHI read).

items.title: List consultation notes (role-scoped)
items.notes: GET /emr/consultations, operationId listConsultations, roles [provider, admin, patient]. Server-forced scope: provider→own provider id, patient→own patient id (cross-patient ?patient= → 403), admin→all. Filters patient/status, pagination limit 25/max 100, order createdAt desc. Returns PHI; writes emr.consultation.list audit row (counts/scope only).

items.title: List EMR patients with consultation stats
items.notes: GET /emr/patients, operationId listEMRPatients, roles [provider, admin]. Provider scoped to own consultations (provider profile resolved or 403); admin sees all. Derives unique patient ids from consultations, IN-query patient roster via patient facade, batch consultation stats (avoids N+1), optional expand=person, hasRecentConsultations (30-day) + date-range filters. Returns PHI roster; writes emr.patients.list audit row.

items.title: Update draft consultation fields
items.notes: PATCH /emr/consultations/{id}, operationId updateConsultation, role [provider:owner]. 404 if missing; provider-owner only (403); only draft mutable (finalized/amended → CONSULTATION_NOT_DRAFT 422); empty body → NO_UPDATE_FIELDS; explicit-null clearing via updateWithNulls. Audit emr.consultation.update records field NAMES only, never PHI values (V-EMR-003).

items.title: Calibrate mm-per-pixel via two-point ruler
items.notes: MeasurementToolbar Calibrate → processToolClick openCalibration → CalibrationDialog enter known mm → buildCalibrationRequest → imagingMgmtUpdateImageCalibration (pixelSpacingMm + pointA/B + knownDistanceMm). On success sets internal mm-per-px, unlocks distance/area tools; failure → toast, dialog stays open. Drives clinical measurement accuracy → full layer set.

items.title: Open a CBCT 3-D volume in an external DICOM viewer
items.notes: CbctStudyCard + use-cbct-viewer.ts → imagingMgmtGetCbctViewerLink mints a short-lived presigned DICOM download, opened in a new tab (no in-app 3-D render). Clinical safety: CBCT never shown as a flat image; frame-count surfaced truthfully. Error → data-testid=cbct-viewer-error.

items.title: Enable push notifications (request permission)
items.notes: On real user gesture calls requestNotificationPermission() -> OneSignal.Notifications.requestPermission(). Whatever the browser answers (grant/deny), the opt-in moment ends: markPushOptInDismissed() persists per-device flag and hides the prompt (no re-nag). No app backend endpoint; permission state lives in browser + OneSignal SDK.

items.title: Get a single notification (ownership-checked)
items.notes: getNotification.ts. Requires user.id (401 UnauthorizedError). findOneByIdAndRecipient enforces recipient match; on miss throws NotFoundError (deliberately does NOT distinguish not-found from no-access). Read-only.

items.title: List my notifications (paginated, filtered)
items.notes: listNotifications.ts. Self-scoped to authenticated user via findManyByRecipient(user.id). Pagination limit default 25 / max 100. Filters whitelisted to type/channel/status/startDate/endDate; startDate/endDate coerced to Date. Read-only.

items.title: Mark all notifications as read (optionally by type)
items.notes: markAllNotificationsAsRead.ts → repo.markAllAsRead. Self-scoped to user.id. Optional ?type filter. Returns markedCount. Write.

items.title: Mark a notification as read
items.notes: markNotificationAsRead.ts → repo.markAsRead. Ownership verified first (404 if not owner/absent). Idempotent: already-read returns existing row unchanged. On transition sets status='read', readAt=now, updatedBy=recipient. Write.

items.title: Clinic step — enter clinic name / country / address / phone with validation

userEntryPoint.control: Next button (ClinicStep: Clinic Name, Country, Address, Phone)

items.notes: validate() requires clinicName and countryCode non-empty before advancing. Country select limited to PH/AU/US (defaults PH). Address/phone optional. Client-side validation only at this step; no backend call until finish. Write-flow -> be-unit + fe-unit.

items.title: Fee schedule step — set default procedure prices

userEntryPoint.control: Fee Schedule table price inputs (₱) + Next

items.notes: FeesStep edits priceCents (peso input * 100, Math.round) for 6 default CDT codes (D0120/D0274/D1110/D2391/D2710/D7140). Optional step; fees stored in wizard state/localStorage but NOT submitted to any endpoint in this wizard (no fee-schedule mutation wired). Money-adjacent data capture -> be-unit + fe-unit. NOTE: gap — fees never reach backend.

items.title: Person onboarding — advance from Personal Info to Address (Next)
items.notes: handlePersonalInfoSubmit stashes personal data in local state and bumps currentStep 1->2. Idempotency guard: early-returns when currentStep !== 1 to absorb double-tap; Next button disabled once past step 1. No backend call. patient-safety/PII profile flow -> fe-unit + be-unit (no contract since no network).

items.title: Create patient profile
items.notes: createPatient.ts. Roles: admin/clinician/registrar/user. Accepts FHIR name[] or dental displayName/personId. Calls person facade ensurePersonForUser / findPersonById (cross-module). Returns 201 with person UUID reference. Patient-safety/inter-module => full layer stack.

items.title: Deactivate (soft-archive) patient
items.notes: deactivatePatient.ts (DELETE /patients/:id, roles admin/registrar/user). Resolves patient then archivePatient → status='archived', archivedAt, needsFollowUp=false. Returns 204. Write => be-unit+fe-unit (guards split below).

items.title: Get patient by id (and /patients/me self lookup)
items.notes: getPatient.ts. Special 'me' resolves current user's patient via findByPersonId. Auto-expand middleware handles person expansion. Read-only => be-unit (authz rule split below).

items.title: List patients (search + filter + paginate)
items.notes: listPatients.ts. Roles admin/clinician/support/user. Filters q/status/branchId/needsFollowUp; pagination default 20 max 100; joins persons via patient-person.facade findManyWithPerson. Read-only => be-unit.

items.title: Merge patients (admin-only, not implemented → 501)
items.notes: mergePatients.ts. Admin-only (user.role==='admin' else 403); returns 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED (EM-PAT-007). BR-020 deferred to Phase 2. Cross-module cascade undocumented (gap WFG-007).

items.title: Unmerge patients (admin-only, not implemented → 501)
items.notes: unmergePatients.ts. Admin-only else 403; returns 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED, mirroring merge. BR-020 deferred Phase 2.

items.title: Update patient profile (partial)
items.notes: updatePatient.ts (PATCH /patients/:id). Partial update of primaryProvider/primaryPharmacy/dentalHistorySummary/needsFollowUp/preferredBranchId; sets updatedBy. Patient-data write => be-unit+fe-unit (branch IDOR rule split below).

items.title: Step 1 — submit personal information (stash & advance)
items.notes: PersonalInfoForm rendered with formId='step-1-form', showButtons=false; external Next button requestSubmits the form. handlePersonalInfoSubmit only stashes data into local state and bumps step 1->2 (no network call). Idempotent guard: returns early if currentStep!==1, and Next is disabled once advanced — protects against iPad double-tap double-advance. Required fields firstName & lastName; dateOfBirth required (age 0..150).

items.title: Upload, crop, and attach profile avatar

userEntryPoint.control: PersonalInfoForm 'Change avatar photo' button (Camera) — only when showAvatar (mode='edit')

items.notes: Avatar sub-flow inside PersonalInfoForm: hidden file input -> image-type validation (alert on non-image) -> ImageCropperDialog (1:1 round) -> selected file stored, preview URL set. On submit, onAvatarUpload(file) callback (parent-supplied; uploads to storage and returns {file?, url}) is awaited and merged into finalData.avatar; upload failure is caught/logged and submit continues. Avatar section (showAvatar) is gated to mode='edit' — NOT shown in onboarding (mode='create'), so onAvatarUpload is currently never wired by any mounted route. INTER-MODULE: person + storage. Latent until an edit-profile route mounts it.

items.title: createPerson — create own person profile
items.notes: Creates the 1:1 Person record for the authenticated user (person.id forced to user.id). Returns 201. PII-bearing entity → patient-safety/privacy classification. Audit-logged (data-modification/privacy/create).

items.title: getPerson — read a person profile (owner | me | admin/support | internal-expand)
items.notes: Read-only. Supports the 'me' alias resolving to caller id, and an internal-expand path that skips per-record authz (parent resource already authorized). Serializes dateOfBirth to ISO string.

items.title: listPersons — paginated/searchable person directory (admin/support)
items.notes: Read-only. Pagination (limit/offset), q full-text search across firstName/lastName, sort whitelist [firstName,lastName,createdAt,updatedAt] default createdAt:desc. Returns { data, pagination }.

items.title: updatePerson — partial update of own person profile

userEntryPoint.control: PreferencesForm 'Save Preferences' button — exported, no mounting route in apps/dentalemon

items.notes: Partial update; undefined = no change, null = clear. PII-bearing → privacy classification. Audit-logged (data-modification/privacy/update).

items.title: Portal root redirects to Appointments tab
items.notes: portal.index.tsx throws redirect({ to: '/portal/appointments' }) so /portal always lands on the default tab.

items.title: Sign out of patient portal
items.notes: Top-bar sign-out button calls Better-Auth authClient.signOut(); on success redirects window.location.href to /auth/sign-in. Better-Auth integrated endpoint (not a generated SDK op).

items.title: Bottom tab navigation between Appointments and Bills
items.notes: Fixed bottom nav (mobile-first) with two tabs. Active tab derived via pathname.startsWith(to) and exposed with aria-current='page'. Client-side TanStack Router navigation, no backend call.

items.title: createPractitioner — FHIR Practitioner with credentials
items.notes: Admin|credentialing-gated create of FHIR Practitioner carrying CONFIDENTIAL credentials (NPI/DEA/state-license) + qualifications. Validates providerId exists (404 NotFound otherwise). JSONB columns (qualification/credential/specialties/languages) default to []/null. active defaults true. 201.

items.title: createPractitionerRole — FHIR PractitionerRole assignment
items.notes: Admin|credentialing-gated. Validates practitionerId exists (404 otherwise). Maps location/availability/role-assignment (code/specialty/period/location/healthcareService/telecom). active defaults true. availableTime/notAvailable nulled on create. 201.

items.title: createProvider — self-service provider profile
items.notes: Authenticated user creates a provider profile for THEMSELVES; person derived server-side via ensurePersonForUser (demographics not accepted in body). Inter-module: person provisioning facade + Better-Auth addUserRole('provider') + session revoke. 409 PROVIDER_EXISTS on second create. Returns provider with expanded person, 201.

items.title: deactivatePractitioner — soft-delete practitioner
items.notes: Admin-only. SOFT delete: sets active=false + deactivatedAt=now(), row retained for audit/legal (FHIR active flag). 404 if missing (never silent 204). Returns 204.

items.title: deactivatePractitionerRole — soft-delete role assignment
items.notes: Admin-only. SOFT delete: active=false + deactivatedAt=now(), row retained. 404 if missing. Returns 204.

items.title: updatePractitioner — patch practitioner record
items.notes: Admin|credentialing-gated partial update. 404 if practitioner not found. Only explicitly-present body fields applied (undefined-guarded partial update over name/active/telecom/address/gender/birthDate/photo/qualification/credential/specialties/languages). JSONB casts bridge Zod↔DB shapes.

items.title: updatePractitionerRole — patch role assignment
items.notes: Admin|credentialing-gated partial update. 404 if not found. Undefined-guarded over active/code/specialty/location/healthcareService/telecom/availableTime/notAvailable/period. notAvailable period Date→ISO-string normalization before persist.

items.title: Get retention enforcement status (admin)
items.notes: FR8.14 observability primitive. Summarizes audit-derived retention enforcement status (lastRunAt, lastRunMode dry-run|enforced|null, runsObserved, last run eligible/actioned counts, live enforcementEnabled posture). Optional tenantId query scope. Clinical/governance + inter-module (reads dental-audit facade) => full layer set. No FE control yet (admin UI surfacing is G1, deferred) but it is an HTTP read endpoint.

items.title: Create review (NPS)
items.notes: createReview. Auth role 'user'. Submits an NPS review with score (0-10) + optional comment for a context entity. reviewer = session.user.id (server-set, not client). Enforces self-review guard, duplicate-prevention conflict, and NPS/comment validation (see business-rule items). Returns 201 with the created review.

items.title: Delete review (owner/admin)
items.notes: deleteReview. Route auth roles 'review:owner'+'admin'. Hard delete (deleteOneById — permanent, not soft). 404 if missing; owner-or-admin guard re-checked in handler. Returns 204 no content.

items.title: Get review by id
items.notes: getReview. Auth role 'user'. 404 NotFound if missing; RBAC access check (reviewer OR reviewedEntity OR admin) — see reviews-rbac-get business-rule. Read-only.

items.title: List reviews with RBAC filtering
items.notes: listReviews. Auth role 'user'. Filters: context/reviewer/reviewType/reviewedEntity. Paginated (page/limit default 1/20, max 100). Role-based scoping enforced (see reviews-rbac-list business-rule). Read-only.

items.title: Open Add Staff modal
items.notes: Button only rendered when role === dentist_owner. Opens StaffCreateModal (data-testid=staff-create-modal). No network call until submit.

items.title: Abort multipart upload (S3 cleanup)
items.notes: Aborts the S3 multipart upload to prevent orphaned parts accruing storage charges (cost/compliance critical), then sets status='failed' and clears multipartUploadId, returns 204. Requires active multipartUploadId + owner match. handlers/storage/abortMultipartUpload.ts. Owner-check covered by multipartOwnerCheck.test.ts.

items.title: Complete single-PUT upload (verify + activate)
items.notes: Verifies the object actually landed in storage (verifyFileExists); on miss sets status='failed' and throws UPLOAD_VERIFICATION_FAILED. On success drives FSM uploading→processing→available. Route requires role user:owner. handlers/storage/completeFileUpload.ts.

items.title: Complete multipart upload (assemble parts)
items.notes: Submits part ETags to S3 to assemble the object. Requires status='uploading', an active multipartUploadId, owner match, and ≥1 part. On success sets status='available' and clears multipartUploadId. handlers/storage/completeMultipartUpload.ts. Owner-check covered by multipartOwnerCheck.test.ts.

items.title: Delete a stored file (storage + DB hard delete)
items.notes: Deletes the S3 object first (storage failure is logged but non-fatal — continues to DB cleanup), then hard-deletes the DB row, returns 204. Emits HIPAA data-modification (delete) audit event. Route role user:owner. handlers/storage/deleteFile.ts.

items.title: Initiate multipart (chunked) upload
items.notes: For large objects (CBCT/DICOM). Creates stored_file (status='uploading'), calls storage.initiateMultipartUpload to get the S3 uploadId, and persists it on the row (multipartUploadId) for later validation on part/complete/abort. Requires an authenticated session. On error rolls back the DB row. Route role 'user'. handlers/storage/initiateMultipartUpload.ts.

items.title: Initiate single-PUT file upload (presigned URL)

userEntryPoint.control: Top bar Attachments icon → AttachmentsSheet upload-zone

items.notes: Creates stored_file row with status='uploading' (owner=user.id), then returns presigned S3 PUT URL (uploadMethod='PUT', expiresAt=now+5min). On any failure after row creation, the DB record is rolled back (deleteOneById cleanup). Route requires role 'user'. handlers/storage/uploadFile.ts. Covered by uploadFile.test.ts.

items.title: Toggle a medical history entry active/inactive or update notes
items.notes: useMedicalHistoryMutations.toggleEntry / updateEntry → updateMedicalHistoryEntry. Deactivating an allergy/condition changes what the safety floor and Rx allergy block surface → patient-safety write, full layers.
